{# ── CONFIG TRẠNG THÁI ── #}
{% set status_map = {
    'pending':   ('Chờ xác nhận',    'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 ring-1 ring-amber-200/50'),
    'confirmed': ('Đã xác nhận',     'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 ring-1 ring-blue-200/50'),
    'packed':    ('Đã đóng gói',     'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700 ring-1 ring-indigo-200/50'),
    'shipped':   ('Đang giao hàng',  'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 ring-1 ring-purple-200/50'),
    'shipping':  ('Đang vận chuyển', 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 ring-1 ring-purple-200/50'),
    'delivered': ('Đã giao thành công','bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 ring-1 ring-emerald-200/50'),
    'completed': ('Hoàn tất',        'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 ring-1 ring-emerald-200/50'),
    'cancelled': ('Đã hủy đơn',      'bg-stone-100 text-stone-500 ring-1 ring-stone-200/50'),
    'failed':    ('Giao thất bại',   'bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 ring-1 ring-rose-200/50'),
    'returned':  ('Hoàn hàng',       'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 ring-1 ring-orange-200/50'),
} %}
{% set current_status = status_map.get(order.status, ('Hệ thống', 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 ring-1 ring-stone-200/50')) %}

<div class="bg-[#f8faf9] min-h-screen pb-24 font-sans selection:bg-stone-900 selection:text-white">

  {# ── STICKY TOP BAR ── #}
  <div class="bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-stone-200 sticky top-0 z-40 shadow-sm no-print">
    <div class="max-w-[1400px] mx-auto px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
      <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
        <a href="{{ url_for('admin.orders') }}" class="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center bg-stone-50 rounded-xl hover:bg-stone-900 hover:text-white transition-all group shadow-sm border border-stone-100 hover:border-stone-900">
          <svg class="w-5 h-5 group-hover:-translate-x-0.5 transition-transform" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7"/></svg>
        </a>
        <div>
          <h1 class="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-stone-900">Quản lý Vận hành</h1>
          <p class="text-[10px] font-bold text-stone-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-0.5">#{{ order.id[:8].upper() }}</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
        <button onclick="window.print()" class="px-5 py-2.5 bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-50 transition-all shadow-sm flex items-center gap-2 active:scale-95">
          <svg class="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6.728 6.75h10.544a2.25 2.25 0 012.25 2.25v5.004a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25 2.25H17.25v2.25a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25 2.25H9a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25-2.25v-2.25H4.972a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25-2.25V9a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25zM10.5 6.75V4.5a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25h3a2.25 2.25 0 012.25 2.25v2.25M17.25 16.5H6.75"/></svg>
          In hóa đơn
        </button>
        {% if order.status in ['pending', 'confirmed', 'packed'] %}
        <button onclick="openCancelModal()" class="px-5 py-2.5 bg-red-50 text-red-600 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-red-100 transition-all shadow-sm active:scale-95">
          Hủy đơn hàng
        </button>
        {% endif %}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="max-w-[1400px] mx-auto px-6 lg:px-10 mt-10 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8">

    {# ══════════════════════════════
       CỘT TRÁI (8/12): FULFILLMENT & ITEMS
       ══════════════════════════════ #}
    <div class="lg:col-span-8 space-y-8">

      {# ─── 1. FULFILLMENT CENTER ─── #}
      <div class="bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 lg:p-10 shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgb(0,0,0,0.03)] border border-stone-100 fade-up print-box">
        <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-8 pb-6 border-b border-stone-50">
          <div>
            <h2 class="text-2xl font-black text-stone-900 tracking-tight">Fulfillment Center</h2>
            <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-stone-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-1">Nghiệp vụ kho vận & điều phối</p>
          </div>
          <span class="px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest shadow-sm {{ current_status[1] }}">
            {{ current_status[0] }}
          </span>
        </div>

        {# KIỂM TRA ĐIỀU KIỆN ĐƯỢC PHÉP XỬ LÝ (CHỐNG XUẤT KHO KHI CHƯA CHUYỂN KHOẢN) #}
        {% set is_cod = order.payment_method in ['COD', 'TIỀN MẶT', 'CASH'] %}
        {% set can_process = is_cod or order.payment_status == 'paid' %}

        {# ── 3 NÚT HÀNH ĐỘNG THEO LUỒNG ── #}
        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6 no-print">

          {# Nút 1: Xác nhận đơn (pending → confirmed) #}
          <button id="btn-confirm"
                  onclick="processOrder('confirm', this)"
                  {% if order.status != 'pending' or not can_process %}disabled{% endif %}
                  class="relative flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-6 rounded-[2rem] border-2 transition-all group overflow-hidden
                  {% if order.status == 'pending' and can_process %}
                    border-stone-900 bg-stone-900 text-white shadow-xl hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-95
                  {% elif order.status in ['confirmed','packed','shipped','shipping','delivered','completed'] %}
                    border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 cursor-default
                  {% else %}
                    border-stone-100 bg-stone-50 text-stone-300 opacity-60 cursor-not-allowed
                  {% endif %}">
            <span class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white/20 flex items-center justify-center font-black text-lg z-10">
              {% if order.status in ['confirmed','packed','shipped','shipping','delivered','completed'] %}
                <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5"/></svg>
              {% else %}1{% endif %}
            </span>
            <span class="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest z-10 btn-text">Xác nhận đơn</span>
            <div class="spinner hidden absolute inset-0 bg-stone-900 flex items-center justify-center z-20">
              <svg class="w-6 h-6 animate-spin text-white" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle class="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><path class="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z"/></svg>
            </div>
          </button>

          {# Nút 2: Đóng gói xong (confirmed → packed) #}
          <button id="btn-pack"
                  onclick="processOrder('pack', this)"
                  {% if order.status != 'confirmed' %}disabled{% endif %}
                  class="relative flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-6 rounded-[2rem] border-2 transition-all group overflow-hidden
                  {% if order.status == 'confirmed' %}
                    border-blue-600 bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-xl hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-95
                  {% elif order.status in ['packed','shipped','shipping','delivered','completed'] %}
                    border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 cursor-default
                  {% else %}
                    border-stone-100 bg-stone-50 text-stone-300 opacity-60 cursor-not-allowed
                  {% endif %}">
            <span class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white/20 flex items-center justify-center font-black text-lg z-10">
              {% if order.status in ['packed','shipped','shipping','delivered','completed'] %}
                <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5"/></svg>
              {% else %}2{% endif %}
            </span>
            <span class="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest z-10 btn-text">Đóng gói xong</span>
            <div class="spinner hidden absolute inset-0 bg-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center z-20">
              <svg class="w-6 h-6 animate-spin text-white" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle class="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><path class="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z"/></svg>
            </div>
          </button>

          {# Nút 3: Tạo vận đơn (packed → shipped) — mở Modal #}
          <button id="btn-fulfill"
                  onclick="openFulfillModal()"
                  {% if order.status != 'packed' %}disabled{% endif %}
                  class="relative flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-6 rounded-[2rem] border-2 transition-all group overflow-hidden
                  {% if order.status == 'packed' %}
                    border-emerald-600 bg-emerald-600 text-white shadow-xl hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-95
                  {% elif order.status in ['shipped','shipping','delivered','completed'] %}
                    border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 cursor-default
                  {% else %}
                    border-stone-100 bg-stone-50 text-stone-300 opacity-60 cursor-not-allowed
                  {% endif %}">
            <span class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white/20 flex items-center justify-center font-black text-lg z-10">
              {% if order.status in ['shipped','shipping','delivered','completed'] %}
                <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5"/></svg>
              {% else %}3{% endif %}
            </span>
            <span class="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest z-10 btn-text">
              {% if order.status in ['shipped','shipping','delivered','completed'] %}
                Đã bắn đơn
              {% else %}
                Tạo vận đơn
              {% endif %}
            </span>
          </button>
        </div>

        {# WARNING NẾU ĐƠN CHUYỂN KHOẢN CHƯA CÓ TIỀN #}
        {% if not can_process and order.status == 'pending' %}
        <div class="mb-8 p-4 bg-rose-50 border border-rose-100 rounded-2xl flex items-start gap-3 no-print">
          <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-rose-500 shrink-0 mt-0.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 9v2m0 4h.01m-6.938 4h13.856c1.54 0 2.502-1.667 1.732-3L13.732 4c-.77-1.333-2.694-1.333-3.464 0L3.34 16c-.77 1.333.192 3 1.732 3z"/></svg>
          <p class="text-[10px] font-bold text-rose-700 leading-relaxed uppercase tracking-wide">
            Lỗi Quy Trình: Đơn hàng yêu cầu {{ order.payment_method }} nhưng chưa nhận được tiền.<br>Kế toán cần "Xác nhận đã thu tiền" ở cột bên phải trước khi Kho có thể xử lý.
          </p>
        </div>
        {% endif %}

        {# ── TRACKING CODE BADGE (Hiện sau khi bắn đơn) ── #}
        {% if order.shipments and order.shipments.tracking_code %}
        <div class="mb-6 p-4 bg-stone-50 border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-between no-print">
          <div>
            <p class="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-400 mb-1">Mã vận đơn</p>
            <p class="text-base font-black text-stone-900 font-mono tracking-wider">{{ order.shipments.tracking_code }}</p>
          </div>
          <span class="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest px-3 py-1.5 bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm text-stone-600 flex items-center gap-1.5">
            {% if provider_info.icon %}<span style="text-transform:none">{{ provider_info.icon }}</span>{% endif %}
            {{ provider_info.name if provider_info.name else order.shipments.provider | upper }}
          </span>
        </div>
        {% endif %}

        {# ── TIMELINE: HÀNH TRÌNH VẬN CHUYỂN LIVE ── #}
        {% if order.shipments %}
        <div class="space-y-6 mt-4 p-6 bg-[#fafaf8] rounded-3xl border border-stone-200/60">
          <div class="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-stone-200/60 pb-4">
            <h3 class="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-stone-400">Hành trình vận chuyển (Live Tracking)</h3>
            {% set s_status = order.shipments.status %}
            <span class="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest shadow-sm
              {% if s_status == 'delivered' %} bg-emerald-500 text-white
              {% elif s_status in ['failed', 'returned', 'cancelled'] %} bg-red-500 text-white
              {% else %} bg-indigo-500 text-white {% endif %}">
              {{ s_status }}
            </span>
          </div>

          {% set events = order.shipments.shipment_events or [] %}
          {% if events %}
          <div class="relative pl-8 space-y-6 before:content-[''] before:absolute before:left-[11px] before:top-2 before:bottom-2 before:w-0.5 before:bg-stone-200">
            {% for event in events %}
            <div class="relative">
              <div class="absolute -left-[27px] top-1 w-3 h-3 rounded-full border-2 border-[#fafaf8] shadow-sm
                {% if loop.first %} bg-stone-900 ring-4 ring-stone-900/10 {% else %} bg-stone-300 {% endif %}"></div>
              <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:justify-between sm:items-start gap-2">
                <div>
                  <p class="text-sm font-black text-stone-900">{{ event.status | upper }}</p>
                  <p class="text-xs font-medium text-stone-600 mt-0.5 leading-relaxed">{{ event.description }}</p>
                  {% if event.location %}
                  <p class="text-[10px] font-bold text-stone-400 mt-1.5">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot mr-1"></i>{{ event.location }}
                  </p>
                  {% endif %}
                </div>
                <time class="text-[10px] font-bold text-stone-400 uppercase tracking-widest tabular-nums shrink-0 sm:text-right">
                  {{ event.created_at[11:16] }}<br class="hidden sm:block">
                  <span class="sm:mt-0.5 inline-block">{{ event.created_at[8:10] }}/{{ event.created_at[5:7] }}</span>
                </time>
              </div>
            </div>
            {% endfor %}
          </div>
          {% else %}
          <p class="text-xs font-bold text-stone-400 text-center py-4">
            Đang chờ cập nhật trạng thái đầu tiên từ hãng vận chuyển...
          </p>
          {% endif %}
        </div>
        {% endif %}
      </div>

      {# ─── 2. DANH SÁCH SẢN PHẨM ─── #}
      <div class="bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgb(0,0,0,0.03)] border border-stone-100 overflow-hidden fade-up delay-2 print-box">
        <div class="px-8 py-6 bg-stone-50/50 border-b border-stone-100 flex justify-between items-center">
          <h3 class="text-xs font-black text-stone-900 uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">Danh mục đóng gói</h3>
          <span class="text-[10px] font-black text-stone-600 bg-white border border-stone-200 shadow-sm px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg">{{ order.order_items|length }} mặt hàng</span>
        </div>

        <div class="divide-y divide-stone-50">
          {% for item in order.order_items %}
          <div class="p-8 flex items-center gap-6 hover:bg-stone-50/50 transition-colors">
            <div class="w-20 aspect-[3/4] bg-stone-50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shrink-0 border border-stone-100">
              <img src="{{ item.get('products', {}).get('thumbnail_url') or 'https://placehold.co/300x400' }}" class="w-full h-full object-cover mix-blend-multiply">
            </div>
            <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
              <p class="text-base font-black text-stone-900 truncate mb-2">{{ item.get('products', {}).get('name', 'Sản phẩm không rõ') }}</p>
              {% set variant = item.get('product_variants') or {} %}
              <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
                <span class="text-[10px] font-black px-2.5 py-1 bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 rounded-md uppercase tracking-widest border border-stone-200/60">
                  Size {{ variant.get('size', item.get('size', 'N/A')) }}
                </span>
                {% if variant.get('color_name') %}
                <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-stone-500 flex items-center gap-1.5 uppercase tracking-wide">
                  <span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full border border-stone-200 shadow-sm variant-color" data-bg="{{ variant.get('color_hex', '#e7e5e4') }}"></span>
                  {{ variant.get('color_name') }}
                </span>
                {% endif %}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="text-right">
              <p class="text-sm font-black text-stone-400 uppercase tracking-[0.15em]">SL: <span class="text-stone-900">{{ item.quantity }}</span></p>
              <p class="text-lg font-black text-stone-900 mt-1">{{ '{:,.0f}'.format(item.unit_price * item.quantity) }} ₫</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          {% endfor %}
        </div>

        <div class="p-8 bg-stone-900 text-white flex justify-between items-center rounded-b-[2.5rem]">
          <span class="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.3em] opacity-70">Tổng tiền hàng</span>
          <span class="text-3xl font-black tracking-tighter">{{ '{:,.0f}'.format(order.total_amount) }} ₫</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    {# ══════════════════════════════
       CỘT PHẢI (4/12): KHÁCH HÀNG & THANH TOÁN
       ══════════════════════════════ #}
    <div class="lg:col-span-4 space-y-8">

      {# ─── 1. TIMELINE TỔNG QUAN ─── #}
      <div class="bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgb(0,0,0,0.03)] border border-stone-100 p-8 fade-up print-box">
        <h3 class="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-stone-400 mb-6">Trạng thái Tổng quan</h3>
        <div class="relative pl-6 space-y-6 before:content-[''] before:absolute before:left-[7px] before:top-2 before:bottom-2 before:w-0.5 before:bg-stone-100">
          {% set status_order = {'pending':0,'confirmed':1,'packed':2,'shipped':3,'shipping':3,'completed':4,'delivered':4,'cancelled':-1,'failed':-1,'returned':-1} %}
          {% set cur_idx = status_order.get(order.status, 0) %}
          {% set steps = [('pending','Khách đặt hàng'),('confirmed','Đã xác nhận'),('packed','Đóng gói xong'),('shipped','Đang vận chuyển'),('completed','Hoàn tất giao dịch')] %}

          {% for slug, label in steps %}
          {% set i = loop.index0 %}
          <div class="relative flex items-center gap-4 {% if i > cur_idx and cur_idx != -1 %}opacity-40{% endif %}">
            <div class="absolute -left-[30px] w-4 h-4 rounded-full border-2 border-white shadow-sm flex items-center justify-center
              {% if cur_idx == -1 %} bg-stone-200
              {% elif i < cur_idx %} bg-stone-900
              {% elif i == cur_idx %} bg-stone-900 ring-4 ring-stone-900/20
              {% else %} bg-stone-200 {% endif %}">
              {% if i < cur_idx and cur_idx != -1 %}
              <svg class="w-2.5 h-2.5 text-white" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg>
              {% endif %}
            </div>
            <span class="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest {% if i <= cur_idx and cur_idx != -1 %}text-stone-900{% else %}text-stone-400{% endif %}">{{ label }}</span>
          </div>
          {% endfor %}

          {% if order.status in ['cancelled', 'failed', 'returned'] %}
          <div class="relative flex items-center gap-4">
            <div class="absolute -left-[30px] w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-red-400 border-2 border-white shadow-sm ring-4 ring-red-400/20"></div>
            <span class="text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-red-500">
              {{ {'cancelled':'Đã hủy', 'failed':'Giao thất bại', 'returned':'Hoàn hàng'}.get(order.status, order.status) }}
            </span>
          </div>
          {% endif %}
        </div>
      </div>

      {# ─── 2. THÔNG TIN GIAO HÀNG ─── #}
      <div class="bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 shadow-sm border border-stone-100 fade-up delay-1 print-box">
        <h3 class="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-400 mb-6">Thông tin Giao hàng</h3>
        <div class="space-y-5">
          <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
            <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-stone-50 border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-stone-900 font-black text-xl shadow-sm">
              {{ order.shipping_address.get('full_name','?')[0] | upper }}
            </div>
            <div>
              <p class="text-sm font-black text-stone-900">{{ order.shipping_address.get('full_name','') }}</p>
              <p class="text-[11px] font-bold text-stone-500 mt-0.5 tracking-wider">{{ order.shipping_address.get('phone','') }}</p>
              {% if order.get('users', {}).get('email') %}
              <p class="text-[10px] font-medium text-stone-400 mt-0.5">{{ order.users.email }}</p>
              {% endif %}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="h-px w-full bg-stone-100"></div>
          <div>
            <p class="text-[10px] font-black text-stone-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1.5">Địa chỉ bàn giao</p>
            <p class="text-sm font-bold text-stone-700 leading-relaxed">
              {{ order.shipping_address.get('address','') }}<br>
              {{ order.shipping_address.get('district','') }}{% if order.shipping_address.get('district') and order.shipping_address.get('city') %}, {% endif %}{{ order.shipping_address.get('city','') }}
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {# ─── 3. KẾ TOÁN & THANH TOÁN ─── #}
      <div class="bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 shadow-sm border border-stone-100 fade-up delay-2 print-box">
        <h3 class="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-400 mb-6">Kế toán & Đối soát</h3>
        <div class="space-y-4">
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center pb-4 border-b border-stone-50">
            <span class="text-[11px] font-bold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Hình thức</span>
            <span class="text-xs font-black text-stone-900 uppercase bg-stone-100 px-3 py-1 rounded-lg">{{ order.payment_method }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center pb-4 border-b border-stone-50">
            <span class="text-[11px] font-bold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Trạng thái</span>
            {% if order.payment_status == 'paid' %}
            <span class="px-3 py-1 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border border-emerald-100 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest rounded-lg flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <svg class="w-3 h-3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5"/></svg>
              Đã thu tiền
            </span>
            {% else %}
            <span class="px-3 py-1 bg-amber-50 text-amber-600 border border-amber-100 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest rounded-lg flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-amber-500 animate-pulse"></span>
              {% if order.payment_method in ['COD', 'TIỀN MẶT', 'CASH'] %}
                Chờ thu hộ (COD)
              {% else %}
                Chờ thanh toán
              {% endif %}
            </span>
            {% endif %}
          </div>

          {% if order.discount_amount and order.discount_amount > 0 %}
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center pb-4 border-b border-stone-50">
            <span class="text-[11px] font-bold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Giảm giá</span>
            <span class="text-xs font-black text-emerald-600">-{{ '{:,.0f}'.format(order.discount_amount) }} ₫</span>
          </div>
          {% endif %}

          {% if order.status != 'cancelled' and order.payment_status != 'paid' %}
            {% if order.payment_method in ['COD', 'TIỀN MẶT', 'CASH'] and order.status not in ['delivered', 'completed'] %}
            {# Đơn COD đang trên đường giao -> Ẩn nút xác nhận thu tiền thủ công #}
            <div class="pt-2 no-print">
              <div class="px-4 py-3.5 bg-blue-50/50 border border-blue-100 rounded-xl flex items-start gap-3">
                <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-500 shrink-0 mt-0.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M11.25 11.25l.041-.02a.75.75 0 011.063.852l-.708 2.836a.75.75 0 001.063.853l.041-.021M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0zm-9-3.75h.008v.008H12V8.25z"/></svg>
                <p class="text-[10px] font-bold text-blue-700 leading-relaxed uppercase tracking-wide">
                  Hệ thống sẽ tự động cập nhật "Đã thu tiền" khi đơn vị vận chuyển báo giao thành công.
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
            {% else %}
            {# Các trường hợp khác (Chuyển khoản, VNPay hoặc COD bị lỗi webhook phải xác nhận tay) #}
            <div class="pt-2 no-print">
              <form action="{{ url_for('admin.update_payment_status', order_id=order.id) }}" method="POST"
                    onsubmit="return confirm('Xác nhận đã thu tiền thành công cho đơn hàng này?')">
                <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                <input type="hidden" name="payment_status" value="paid">
                <button type="submit" class="w-full py-3.5 bg-stone-900 text-white rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] hover:bg-stone-800 transition-all shadow-lg active:scale-95">
                  Xác nhận đã thu tiền
                </button>
              </form>
            </div>
            {% endif %}
          {% endif %}
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

{# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   MODAL: FULFILLMENT — CHỌN HÃNG VẬN CHUYỂN (DYNAMIC)
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ #}
{% if order.status == 'packed' %}
<div id="modal-fulfill" class="fixed inset-0 z-50 hidden items-center justify-center p-4">
  <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-stone-900/40 backdrop-blur-sm" onclick="closeFulfillModal()"></div>
  <div class="relative bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl p-10 max-w-md w-full animate-modal">
    <button onclick="closeFulfillModal()" class="absolute top-6 right-6 w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-stone-100 flex items-center justify-center text-stone-500 hover:bg-stone-200 hover:text-stone-900 transition-colors">
      <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
    </button>
    <h3 class="text-xl font-black text-stone-900 mb-2 tracking-tight text-center uppercase">Bàn giao vận chuyển</h3>
    <p class="text-center text-[10px] font-bold text-stone-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-8">Chọn đối tác vận chuyển</p>

    {# DYNAMIC: Render từ ShippingService.list_providers() qua controller #}
    <div class="space-y-3 mb-8">
      {% for p in providers %}
      <label class="block cursor-pointer">
        <input type="radio" name="provider" value="{{ p.id }}"
               class="peer sr-only"
               {% if p.id == 'mock' %}checked{% endif %}>
        <div class="p-4 border-2 border-stone-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-4 peer-checked:border-stone-900 peer-checked:bg-stone-50 transition-all hover:border-stone-300">
          <span class="text-xl w-8 text-center">{{ p.icon }}</span>
          <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
            <p class="font-black text-sm text-stone-900">{{ p.name or p.label }}</p>
            {% if p.description %}
            <p class="text-[10px] font-bold text-stone-400 mt-0.5">{{ p.description }}</p>
            {% endif %}
          </div>
          <div class="w-4 h-4 rounded-full border-2 border-stone-200 peer-checked:border-stone-900 peer-checked:bg-stone-900 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
            <div class="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-white rounded-full"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </label>
      {% endfor %}
    </div>

    <button onclick="submitFulfill()" id="btnSubmitFulfill"
            class="relative overflow-hidden w-full bg-stone-900 text-white py-4 rounded-xl text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] hover:bg-stone-800 transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-xl shadow-stone-900/20 flex items-center justify-center h-[52px]">
      <span class="btn-text">Xác nhận & Bắn lệnh ship</span>
      <div class="spinner hidden absolute inset-0 bg-stone-900 items-center justify-center z-20">
        <svg class="w-5 h-5 animate-spin text-white" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle class="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><path class="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z"/></svg>
      </div>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
{% endif %}

{# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   MODAL: HỦY ĐƠN HÀNG
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ #}
{% if order.status in ['pending', 'confirmed', 'packed'] %}
<div id="modal-cancel" class="fixed inset-0 z-50 hidden items-center justify-center p-4">
  <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-stone-900/60 backdrop-blur-sm" onclick="closeCancelModal()"></div>
  <div class="relative bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl max-w-md w-full p-10 animate-modal">
    <div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center mb-8">
      <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-[1.25rem] bg-red-50 flex items-center justify-center mb-6">
        <svg class="w-8 h-8 text-red-500" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 9v3.75m-9.303 3.376c-.866 1.5.217 3.374 1.948 3.374h14.71c1.73 0 2.813-1.874 1.948-3.374L13.949 3.378c-.866-1.5-3.032-1.5-3.898 0L2.697 16.126zM12 15.75h.007v.008H12v-.008z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <h2 class="text-xl font-black text-stone-900 mb-2">Hủy đơn hàng</h2>
      <p class="text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 leading-relaxed">
        Bạn đang thực hiện hủy đơn <span class="font-bold text-stone-900">#{{ order.id[:8].upper() }}</span>.<br>
        Khách hàng sẽ nhận được thông báo.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div id="cancel-error" class="hidden mb-4 p-4 rounded-xl bg-red-50 text-[11px] font-bold text-red-600 text-center uppercase tracking-widest"></div>
    <div class="flex gap-3">
      <button onclick="closeCancelModal()" class="flex-1 px-5 py-4 bg-stone-100 hover:bg-stone-200 text-stone-900 font-black text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest rounded-2xl transition-all active:scale-95">Quay lại</button>
      <button id="btn-confirm-cancel" onclick="confirmCancelAdmin()"
              class="flex-1 px-5 py-4 bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-black text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest rounded-2xl transition-all active:scale-95 relative overflow-hidden h-[52px]">
        <span class="btn-text">Xác nhận Hủy</span>
        <div class="spinner hidden absolute inset-0 bg-red-600 items-center justify-center z-20">
          <svg class="w-4 h-4 animate-spin text-white" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle class="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><path class="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z"/></svg>
        </div>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
{% endif %}

<style>
  @media print {
    body { background: white !important; }
    .no-print, button, .sticky { display: none !important; }
    .lg\:col-span-8, .lg\:col-span-4 { width: 100% !important; grid-column: span 12 / span 12 !important; }
    .print-box { box-shadow: none !important; border: 1px solid #eee !important; margin-bottom: 2rem !important; }
  }
  .fade-up { opacity: 0; animation: fadeUpAnim 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) forwards; }
  .delay-1 { animation-delay: 0.1s; } .delay-2 { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
  @keyframes fadeUpAnim { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  .animate-modal { animation: modalIn 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) forwards; }
  @keyframes modalIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.95) translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translateY(0); } }
</style>

<script>
const ORDER_ID = "{{ order.id }}";

// ── Màu biến thể ──
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  document.querySelectorAll('.variant-color').forEach(el => {
    el.style.backgroundColor = el.dataset.bg;
  });
});

// ── Bước 1 & 2: Xác nhận đơn / Đóng gói ──
async function processOrder(action, btnElement) {
  if (btnElement.disabled) return;
  if (!confirm("Xác nhận hoàn thành bước này?")) return;

  const btnText = btnElement.querySelector('.btn-text');
  const spinner = btnElement.querySelector('.spinner');
  btnText.classList.add('opacity-0');
  spinner.classList.remove('hidden');
  btnElement.disabled = true;

  try {
    const res = await fetch(`/admin/orders/${ORDER_ID}/${action}`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", "X-CSRFToken": "{{ csrf_token() }}" }
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
      window.location.reload();
    } else {
      alert("❌ " + data.message);
      _resetBtn(btnElement);
    }
  } catch (e) {
    alert("Lỗi máy chủ. Vui lòng thử lại.");
    _resetBtn(btnElement);
  }
}

function _resetBtn(btn) {
  const btnText = btn.querySelector('.btn-text');
  const spinner = btn.querySelector('.spinner');
  if (btnText) btnText.classList.remove('opacity-0');
  if (spinner) spinner.classList.add('hidden');
  btn.disabled = false;
}

// ── Bước 3: Modal chọn hãng vận chuyển ──
function openFulfillModal() {
  const m = document.getElementById('modal-fulfill');
  if (m) { m.classList.remove('hidden'); m.classList.add('flex'); }
}
function closeFulfillModal() {
  const m = document.getElementById('modal-fulfill');
  if (m) { m.classList.add('hidden'); m.classList.remove('flex'); }
}

async function submitFulfill() {
  const selectedInput = document.querySelector('input[name="provider"]:checked');
  if (!selectedInput) { alert("Vui lòng chọn đối tác vận chuyển."); return; }

  const provider = selectedInput.value;
  const btn      = document.getElementById('btnSubmitFulfill');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.querySelector('.btn-text').classList.add('hidden');
  btn.querySelector('.spinner').classList.remove('hidden');
  btn.querySelector('.spinner').classList.add('flex');

  try {
    const res = await fetch(`/admin/orders/${ORDER_ID}/fulfill`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", "X-CSRFToken": "{{ csrf_token() }}" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ provider })
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
      const code = data.tracking_code || "—";
      alert(`✅ Bắn đơn thành công!\nMã vận đơn: ${code}`);
      window.location.reload();
    } else {
      alert("❌ " + data.message);
      _resetFulfillBtn(btn);
    }
  } catch (e) {
    alert("Lỗi kết nối API.");
    _resetFulfillBtn(btn);
  }
}

function _resetFulfillBtn(btn) {
  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.querySelector('.btn-text').classList.remove('hidden');
  const spinner = btn.querySelector('.spinner');
  spinner.classList.add('hidden');
  spinner.classList.remove('flex');
}

// ── Hủy đơn ──
function openCancelModal() {
  const m = document.getElementById("modal-cancel");
  if (m) { m.classList.remove("hidden"); m.classList.add("flex"); }
}
function closeCancelModal() {
  const m = document.getElementById("modal-cancel");
  if (m) { m.classList.add("hidden"); m.classList.remove("flex"); }
}

async function confirmCancelAdmin() {
  const btn = document.getElementById("btn-confirm-cancel");
  const err = document.getElementById("cancel-error");
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.querySelector('.btn-text').classList.add('hidden');
  btn.querySelector('.spinner').classList.remove('hidden');
  btn.querySelector('.spinner').classList.add('flex');

  try {
    const res = await fetch(`/profile/orders/${ORDER_ID}/cancel`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "X-Requested-With": "XMLHttpRequest", "X-CSRFToken": "{{ csrf_token() }}" }
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
      window.location.reload();
    } else {
      err.textContent = data.message;
      err.classList.remove("hidden");
      _resetCancelBtn(btn);
    }
  } catch (e) {
    err.textContent = "Lỗi mạng!";
    err.classList.remove("hidden");
    _resetCancelBtn(btn);
  }
}

function _resetCancelBtn(btn) {
  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.querySelector('.btn-text').classList.remove('hidden');
  const spinner = btn.querySelector('.spinner');
  spinner.classList.add('hidden');
  spinner.classList.remove('flex');
}

// ESC đóng modal
document.addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
  if (e.key === "Escape") { closeCancelModal(); closeFulfillModal(); }
});
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

             class="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-white text-stone-500 border border-stone-200 hover:bg-stone-50 hover:text-stone-900 text-sm font-bold transition-all shadow-sm">{{ pg }}</a>
        {% elif pg == page - 3 or pg == page + 3 %}

        {% endif %}

<style>
  .no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .fade-up { opacity: 0; animation: fadeUpAnim 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) forwards; }
  .delay-1 { animation-delay: 0.1s; } .delay-2 { animation-delay: 0.2s; } .delay-3 { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
  @keyframes fadeUpAnim { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
</style>

<script>
// Logic Checkbox cho tính năng Thao tác hàng loạt
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const checkAll = document.getElementById('checkAll');
    const checkboxes = document.querySelectorAll('.order-checkbox');
    const bulkActions = document.getElementById('bulk-actions');
    const selectedCount = document.getElementById('selected-count');

    function updateBulkActions() {
        const checkedCount = document.querySelectorAll('.order-checkbox:checked').length;
        if (checkedCount > 0) {
            bulkActions.classList.remove('hidden');
            bulkActions.classList.add('flex');
            selectedCount.textContent = checkedCount;
        } else {
            bulkActions.classList.add('hidden');
            bulkActions.classList.remove('flex');
        }
    }

    if(checkAll) {
        checkAll.addEventListener('change', function() {
            checkboxes.forEach(cb => cb.checked = this.checked);
            updateBulkActions();
        });
    }

    checkboxes.forEach(cb => {
        cb.addEventListener('change', function() {
            const allChecked = document.querySelectorAll('.order-checkbox:checked').length === checkboxes.length;
            checkAll.checked = allChecked;
            updateBulkActions();
        });
    });
});
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

      <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-100 shadow-sm p-6">
        <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-stone-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
          <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M7.5 8.25h9m-9 3H12m-9.75 1.51c0 1.6 1.123 2.994 2.707 3.227 1.129.166 2.27.293 3.423.379.35.026.67.21.865.501L12 21l2.755-4.133a1.14 1.14 0 0 1 .865-.501 48.172 48.172 0 0 0 3.423-.379c1.584-.233 2.707-1.626 2.707-3.228V6.741c0-1.602-1.123-2.995-2.707-3.228A48.394 48.394 0 0 0 12 3c-2.392 0-4.744.175-7.043.513C3.373 3.746 2.25 5.14 2.25 6.741v6.018z"/></svg>
          Lý do khách hàng
        </h3>
        <p class="text-stone-700 leading-relaxed bg-stone-50 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm">{{ rr.reason }}</p>
      </div>

      {# Hình ảnh sản phẩm #}
      {% if rr.image_url %}
      <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-100 shadow-sm p-6">
        <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-stone-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
          <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m2.25 15.75 5.159-5.159a2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3.182 0l5.159 5.159m-1.5-1.5 1.409-1.409a2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3.182 0l2.909 2.909m-18 3.75h16.5a1.5 1.5 0 0 0 1.5-1.5V6a1.5 1.5 0 0 0-1.5-1.5H3.75A1.5 1.5 0 0 0 2.25 6v12a1.5 1.5 0 0 0 1.5 1.5zm10.5-11.25h.008v.008h-.008V8.25zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0z"/></svg>
          Hình ảnh đính kèm
        </h3>
        <a href="{{ rr.image_url }}" target="_blank" class="block group">
          <img src="{{ rr.image_url }}" alt="Ảnh sản phẩm đổi/trả"
               class="w-full max-h-80 object-contain rounded-xl bg-stone-50 border border-stone-100 group-hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-zoom-in"
               onerror="this.parentElement.innerHTML='<p class=\'text-xs text-stone-400 text-center py-8\'>Không tải được ảnh. <a href=\'{{ rr.image_url }}\' target=\'_blank\' class=\'underline\'>Mở link gốc</a></p>'">
        </a>
        <p class="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-2 text-center">Bấm vào ảnh để xem full size</p>
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      {# Sản phẩm trong đơn hàng #}
      {% if items %}
      <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-100 shadow-sm p-6">
        <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-stone-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
          <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.75 10.5V6a3.75 3.75 0 1 0-7.5 0v4.5m11.356-1.993 1.263 12c.07.665-.45 1.243-1.119 1.243H4.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.12-1.243l1.264-12A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 5.513 7.5h12.974c.576 0 1.059.435 1.119 1.007z"/></svg>
          Sản phẩm trong đơn
        </h3>
        <div class="space-y-3">
          {% for item in items %}
          {% set product = item.get('products', {}) or {} %}
          <div class="flex items-center gap-4 py-2">
            {% if product.get('thumbnail_url') %}
            <img src="{{ product.thumbnail_url }}" alt="{{ product.get('name','') }}"
                 class="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg object-cover bg-stone-100 flex-shrink-0">
            {% else %}
            <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg bg-stone-100 flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center">
              <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-stone-300" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5" d="m2.25 15.75 5.159-5.159a2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3.182 0l5.159 5.159m-1.5-1.5 1.409-1.409a2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3.182 0l2.909 2.909"/></svg>
            </div>
            {% endif %}
            <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
              <p class="font-semibold text-stone-800 text-sm truncate">{{ product.get('name', 'Sản phẩm đã xóa') }}</p>
              <p class="text-xs text-stone-400">
                SL: {{ item.quantity }}
                {% if item.size %} · Size: {{ item.size }}{% endif %}
                · {{ "{:,.0f}".format(item.unit_price) }}đ/sp
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
          {% endfor %}
        </div>
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      {# Ghi chú admin nếu đã có #}
      {% if rr.admin_note %}
      <div class="bg-stone-50 rounded-2xl border border-stone-200 p-5">
        <p class="text-xs font-bold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Ghi chú nội bộ</p>
        <p class="text-sm text-stone-700">{{ rr.admin_note }}</p>
        {% if rr.reviewed_at %}
        <p class="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-2">Xử lý lúc {{ rr.reviewed_at[:16].replace('T', ' ') }}</p>
        {% endif %}
      </div>
      {% endif %}

    </div>

    {# ────── CỘT PHẢI: Thông tin đơn + Hành động ────── #}
    <div class="space-y-5">

      {# Tóm tắt đơn hàng #}
      <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-100 shadow-sm p-6">
        <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-stone-900 mb-4">Tóm tắt đơn hàng</h3>
        <div class="space-y-3 text-sm">
          <div class="flex justify-between">
            <span class="text-stone-500">Giá trị đơn</span>
            <span class="font-bold text-stone-900">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(order.get('total_amount', 0)) }}đ</span>
          </div>
          {% set refunded = order.get('refunded_amount', 0) or 0 %}
          {% if refunded > 0 %}
          <div class="flex justify-between text-red-500">
            <span>Đã hoàn trả</span>
            <span class="font-bold">-{{ "{:,.0f}".format(refunded) }}đ</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex justify-between border-t border-stone-100 pt-3">
            <span class="text-stone-500">Doanh thu thực</span>
            <span class="font-bold text-emerald-700">{{ "{:,.0f}".format([order.get('total_amount',0)|float - refunded|float, 0]|max) }}đ</span>
          </div>
          {% endif %}
          {% if rr.status == 'refunded' and rr.refund_amount %}
          <div class="mt-3 p-3 bg-emerald-50 rounded-xl border border-emerald-100 text-center">
            <p class="text-xs font-bold text-emerald-700">Đã hoàn tiền thành công</p>
            <p class="text-lg font-black text-emerald-800 mt-0.5">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(rr.refund_amount) }}đ</p>
            <p class="text-xs text-emerald-600 mt-1">{{ rr.refunded_at[:16].replace('T', ' ') if rr.refunded_at else '' }}</p>
          </div>
          {% endif %}
        </div>
      </div>

      {# ══ PANEL HÀNH ĐỘNG ══ #}

      {# ── pending: Duyệt hoặc Từ chối ── #}
      {% if rr.status == 'pending' %}
      <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-amber-200 shadow-sm p-6 space-y-4">
        <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-stone-900 flex items-center gap-2">
          <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-amber-500 animate-pulse"></span>
          Xử lý yêu cầu
        </h3>
        <p class="text-xs text-stone-500">Kiểm tra hình ảnh và lý do của khách. Nếu hợp lệ → Duyệt và liên hệ khách nhận lại hàng. Nếu không hợp lệ → Từ chối với lý do.</p>

        {# Form duyệt #}
        <form action="{{ url_for('admin.approve_return', rr_id=rr.id) }}" method="POST" class="space-y-3">
          <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
          <textarea name="admin_note" rows="2" placeholder="Ghi chú khi duyệt (không bắt buộc)..."
                    class="w-full text-sm rounded-xl border border-stone-200 px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-300 resize-none placeholder-stone-300"></textarea>
          <button type="submit"
                  class="w-full py-2.5 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white text-sm font-bold rounded-xl transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
            <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5"/></svg>
            Duyệt yêu cầu
          </button>
        </form>

        <div class="border-t border-stone-100 pt-4 space-y-3">
          <form action="{{ url_for('admin.reject_return', rr_id=rr.id) }}" method="POST" class="space-y-3"
                onsubmit="return validateRejectNote(this)">
            <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
            <textarea name="admin_note" rows="2" placeholder="Lý do từ chối (BẮT BUỘC)..."
                      class="w-full text-sm rounded-xl border border-stone-200 px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-300 resize-none placeholder-stone-300" required></textarea>
            <button type="submit"
                    class="w-full py-2.5 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 hover:bg-red-100 text-red-600 text-sm font-bold rounded-xl transition-colors">
              Từ chối yêu cầu
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      {# ── approved: Xác nhận đã hoàn tiền ── #}
      {% if rr.status == 'approved' %}
      <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-blue-200 shadow-sm p-6 space-y-4">
        <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-stone-900">Xác nhận hoàn tiền</h3>
        <div class="p-3 bg-blue-50 rounded-xl border border-blue-100 text-xs text-blue-700 space-y-1">
          <p class="font-bold">Quy trình:</p>
          <p>1. Liên hệ khách qua SĐT: <strong>{{ user.get('phone', '(chưa có)') }}</strong></p>
          <p>2. Nhận lại hàng từ khách</p>
          <p>3. Hoàn tiền cho khách</p>
          <p>4. Bấm nút xác nhận bên dưới</p>
        </div>
        <form action="{{ url_for('admin.complete_refund', rr_id=rr.id) }}" method="POST" class="space-y-3"
              onsubmit="return confirm('Xác nhận đã hoàn tiền thành công cho khách?\n\nDoanh thu sẽ được trừ tự động trên hệ thống.')">
          <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
          <div>
            <label class="text-xs font-bold text-stone-600 block mb-1.5">Số tiền hoàn (để trống = hoàn toàn bộ)</label>
            <div class="relative">
              <input type="number" name="refund_amount" step="1000" min="1000"
                     placeholder="{{ order.get('total_amount', 0)|int }}"
                     class="w-full text-sm rounded-xl border border-stone-200 px-3 py-2.5 pr-8 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-300 placeholder-stone-300">
              <span class="absolute right-3 top-2.5 text-xs text-stone-400 font-bold">đ</span>
            </div>
            <p class="text-xs text-stone-400 mt-1">Giá trị đơn: <strong>{{ "{:,.0f}".format(order.get('total_amount', 0)) }}đ</strong></p>
          </div>
          <button type="submit"
                  class="w-full py-2.5 bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 text-white text-sm font-bold rounded-xl transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
            <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.25 18.75a60.07 60.07 0 0 1 15.797 2.101c.727.198 1.453-.342 1.453-1.096V18.75M3.75 4.5v.75A.75.75 0 0 1 3 6h-.75m0 0v-.375c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125H20.25M2.25 6v9m18-10.5v.75c0 .414.336.75.75.75h.75m-1.5-1.5h.375c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v9.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-.375m1.5-1.5H21a.75.75 0 0 0-.75.75v.75m0 0H3.75m0 0h-.375a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V15m1.5 1.5v-.75A.75.75 0 0 0 3 15h-.75M15 10.5a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0zm3 0h.008v.008H18V10.5zm-12 0h.008v.008H6V10.5z"/></svg>
            Xác nhận đã hoàn tiền — Trừ doanh thu
          </button>
        </form>
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      {# ── rejected / refunded: Trạng thái cuối ── #}
      {% if rr.status == 'rejected' %}
      <div class="bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200 p-5 text-center">
        <svg class="w-8 h-8 text-red-400 mx-auto mb-2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18 18 6M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
        <p class="text-sm font-bold text-red-700">Đã từ chối</p>
        <p class="text-xs text-red-500 mt-1">Khách hàng có thể gửi lại yêu cầu mới.</p>
      </div>
      {% endif %}

      {% if rr.status == 'refunded' %}
      <div class="bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200 p-5 text-center">
        <svg class="w-8 h-8 text-emerald-500 mx-auto mb-2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5"/></svg>
        <p class="text-sm font-bold text-emerald-700">Đã hoàn tiền thành công</p>
        <p class="text-xs text-emerald-600 mt-1">Doanh thu đã được cập nhật tự động.</p>
      </div>
      {% endif %}

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  function validateRejectNote(form) {
    const note = form.querySelector('[name="admin_note"]').value.trim();
    if (!note) {
      alert("Vui lòng nhập lý do từ chối trước khi xác nhận.");
      return false;
    }
    return confirm("Xác nhận từ chối yêu cầu này?\n\nLý do: " + note);
  }
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

{% block title %}Yêu cầu Đổi / Trả — GUA Admin{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
{% set tab_labels = [
  ('all',      'Tất cả',        'text-stone-600'),
  ('pending',  'Chờ duyệt',     'text-amber-600'),
  ('approved', 'Đã duyệt',      'text-blue-600'),
  ('rejected', 'Từ chối',       'text-red-500'),
  ('refunded', 'Hoàn tiền xong','text-emerald-600'),
] %}

<div class="space-y-6">

  {# ── Header ── #}
  <div class="flex items-center justify-between">

      {{ tab_counts['pending'] }} yêu cầu chờ duyệt
    </span>
    {% endif %}
  </div>

  {# ── Tab filter ── #}
  <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-100 shadow-sm p-1.5 flex gap-1 flex-wrap">
    {% for slug, label, color in tab_labels %}
    <a href="{{ url_for('admin.return_requests', status=(slug if slug != 'all' else '')) }}"
       class="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-semibold transition-all

      {{ label }}
      <span class="text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full
                   {% if current_status == slug %}bg-white/20 text-white{% else %}bg-stone-100 {{ color }}{% endif %}">
        {{ tab_counts.get(slug, 0) }}
      </span>
    </a>
    {% endfor %}
  </div>

  {# ── Table ── #}
  <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-100 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
    {% if returns %}
    <table class="w-full text-sm">
      <thead class="border-b border-stone-100 bg-stone-50">
        <tr>
          <th class="px-6 py-4 text-left text-xs font-bold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Khách hàng</th>
          <th class="px-6 py-4 text-left text-xs font-bold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Đơn hàng</th>
          <th class="px-6 py-4 text-left text-xs font-bold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Lý do</th>
          <th class="px-6 py-4 text-left text-xs font-bold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Ngày gửi</th>
          <th class="px-6 py-4 text-left text-xs font-bold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Trạng thái</th>
          <th class="px-6 py-4 text-right text-xs font-bold text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Thao tác</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody class="divide-y divide-stone-50">
        {% for rr in returns %}
        {% set order = rr.get('orders', {}) or {} %}
        {% set user  = rr.get('users', {})  or {} %}

        {% set status_ui = {
          'pending':  ('Chờ duyệt',      'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700'),
          'approved': ('Đã duyệt',        'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700'),
          'rejected': ('Từ chối',         'bg-red-100 text-red-600'),
          'refunded': ('Hoàn tiền xong',  'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700'),
        } %}
        {% set ui = status_ui.get(rr.status, ('Không rõ', 'bg-stone-100 text-stone-500')) %}

        <tr class="hover:bg-stone-50/60 transition-colors">
          {# Khách hàng #}
          <td class="px-6 py-4">
            <p class="font-semibold text-stone-800">{{ user.get('full_name', 'N/A') }}</p>
            <p class="text-xs text-stone-400">{{ user.get('email', '') }}</p>
          </td>

          {# Đơn hàng #}
          <td class="px-6 py-4">
            <a href="{{ url_for('admin.order_detail', order_id=rr.order_id) }}"
               class="font-mono text-xs font-bold text-stone-800 hover:text-stone-900 underline underline-offset-2">
              #{{ rr.order_id[:8].upper() }}
            </a>
            <p class="text-xs text-stone-500 mt-0.5">
              {{ "{:,.0f}".format(order.get('total_amount', 0)) }}đ
            </p>
          </td>

          {# Lý do #}
          <td class="px-6 py-4">
            <p class="text-stone-700 line-clamp-2 max-w-xs">{{ rr.reason[:80] }}{% if rr.reason|length > 80 %}…{% endif %}</p>
          </td>

          {# Ngày gửi #}
          <td class="px-6 py-4 text-stone-500 text-xs">
            {{ rr.requested_at[:16].replace('T', ' ') if rr.requested_at else 'N/A' }}
          </td>

          {# Trạng thái #}
          <td class="px-6 py-4">
            <span class="px-2.5 py-1 text-xs font-bold rounded-full {{ ui[1] }}">{{ ui[0] }}</span>
            {% if rr.status == 'refunded' and rr.refund_amount %}
            <p class="text-xs text-emerald-600 font-semibold mt-1">-{{ "{:,.0f}".format(rr.refund_amount) }}đ</p>
            {% endif %}
          </td>

          {# Thao tác #}
          <td class="px-6 py-4 text-right">
            <a href="{{ url_for('admin.return_request_detail', rr_id=rr.id) }}"
               class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-stone-900 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg hover:bg-stone-700 transition-colors">
              Xem chi tiết
            </a>
          </td>
        </tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>

    {# Pagination #}
    {% if total_pages > 1 %}
    <div class="px-6 py-4 border-t border-stone-100 flex items-center justify-between">

      <div class="flex gap-2">

                  {% if p == page %}bg-stone-900 text-white{% else %}bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-200{% endif %}">
          {{ p }}

        {% endfor %}
      </div>
    </div>
    {% endif %}

    {% else %}
    <div class="py-20 text-center">

        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16.023 9.348h4.992v-.001M2.985 19.644v-4.992m0 0h4.992m-4.993 0 3.181 3.183a8.25 8.25 0 0 0 13.803-3.7M4.031 9.865a8.25 8.25 0 0 1 13.803-3.7l3.181 3.182m0-4.991v4.99"/>

  </div>

{% block title %}Đơn vị vận chuyển{% endblock %}

.btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--text2) }

/* ── MODAL ── */

.sp-overlay.show { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all }
.sp-modal { background: var(--surface); border-radius: var(--r-lg); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); width: 480px; max-width: calc(100vw - 32px); transform: translateY(8px) scale(.98); transition: transform .2s; border: 1px solid var(--border) }
.sp-overlay.show .sp-modal { transform: none }
.sp-modal--wide { width: 560px }
.sp-modal__head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 18px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border2) }
.sp-modal__title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600 }

.sp-modal__close:hover { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text) }
.sp-modal__body { padding: 20px }
.sp-modal__foot { display: flex; gap: 8px; justify-content: flex-end; padding: 16px 20px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border2) }

/* Form */

.sp-field label .req { color: var(--red) }

/* JSON editor */

/* Toast */
.sp-toast {
  position: fixed; bottom: 24px; right: 24px; z-index: 9999;

  padding: 11px 18px; font-size: 13px; font-family: var(--font);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); transform: translateY(8px); opacity: 0;
  transition: all .22s; pointer-events: none; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
}
.sp-toast.show { transform: none; opacity: 1 }
.sp-toast--err { background: var(--red) }
.sp-toast--ok::before  { content: '✓'; font-weight: 700 }
.sp-toast--err::before { content: '✕'; font-weight: 700 }

@media (max-width: 600px) {
  .sp-stats { grid-template-columns: 1fr }

  .sp-field--full { grid-column: 1 }

<div class="sp">

  <header class="sp-head">
    <div>
      <h1>Đơn vị vận chuyển</h1>
      <p>Quản lý và cấu hình các hãng vận chuyển tích hợp</p>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-primary" onclick="openAdd()">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>
      Thêm mới
    </button>
  </header>

  <div class="sp-stats">
    <div class="sp-stat">
      <div class="sp-stat__icon sp-stat__icon--blue">📦</div>
      <div><div class="sp-stat__num" id="sTotal">{{ providers|length }}</div><div class="sp-stat__label">Tổng cộng</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sp-stat">
      <div class="sp-stat__icon sp-stat__icon--green">✅</div>
      <div><div class="sp-stat__num" id="sActive">{{ providers|selectattr('is_active')|list|length }}</div><div class="sp-stat__label">Hoạt động</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sp-stat">
      <div class="sp-stat__icon sp-stat__icon--red">⏸</div>
      <div><div class="sp-stat__num" id="sOff">{{ providers|rejectattr('is_active')|list|length }}</div><div class="sp-stat__label">Tạm dừng</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="sp-card">
    <table class="sp-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th style="width:44px">TT</th>
          <th>Hãng vận chuyển</th>
          <th>ID / Slug</th>
          <th style="width:110px">Trạng thái</th>
          <th style="width:130px; text-align:right">Thao tác</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody id="tbody">
        {% for p in providers %}
        <tr class="sp-row{% if not p.is_active %} sp-row--off{% endif %}" data-id="{{ p.id }}">
          <td><span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)">{{ p.sort_order or 0 }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="sp-provider">
              <div class="sp-avatar">
                {% if p.icon %}
                  {% if p.icon.startswith('fa-') or p.icon.startswith('fas ') or p.icon.startswith('far ') %}
                    <i class="fa-solid {{ p.icon }}" style="font-size:15px;color:var(--accent)"></i>
                  {% elif p.icon.startswith('http') %}
                    <img src="{{ p.icon }}" alt="">
                  {% else %}
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-{{ p.icon }}" style="font-size:15px;color:var(--accent)"></i>
                  {% endif %}
                {% else %}
                  {{ p.name[0]|upper }}
                {% endif %}
              </div>
              <div>
                <div class="sp-name">{{ p.name }}</div>
                {% if p.description %}<div class="sp-desc">{{ p.description }}</div>{% endif %}
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><code class="sp-code">{{ p.id }}</code></td>
          <td>
            <button class="sp-toggle{% if p.is_active %} sp-toggle--on{% endif %}" onclick="doToggle('{{ p.id }}', this)">
              <span class="sp-dot"></span>{% if p.is_active %}Bật{% else %}Tắt{% endif %}
            </button>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="sp-actions">
              <button class="btn-icon" onclick="openEdit('{{ p.id }}')" title="Chỉnh sửa">
                <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7"/><path d="M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z"/></svg>
              </button>
              <button class="btn-icon" onclick="openConfig('{{ p.id }}')" title="Cấu hình API">
                <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M19.07 4.93l-1.41 1.41M4.93 4.93l1.41 1.41M12 2v2M12 20v2M2 12h2M20 12h2M19.07 19.07l-1.41-1.41M4.93 19.07l1.41-1.41"/></svg>
              </button>
              <button class="btn-icon btn-icon--del" onclick="doDel('{{ p.id }}','{{ p.name }}')" title="Xóa">
                <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6l-1 14H6L5 6"/><path d="M10 11v6M14 11v6"/><path d="M9 6V4h6v2"/></svg>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        {% else %}
        <tr><td colspan="5" class="sp-empty">Chưa có hãng nào. <a href="#" onclick="openAdd()">Thêm ngay →</a></td></tr>
        {% endfor %}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MODAL: THÊM / SỬA -->
<div class="sp-overlay" id="ovMain" onclick="if(e.target===this)closeAll()">
  <div class="sp-modal">
    <div class="sp-modal__head">
      <span class="sp-modal__title" id="mTitle">Thêm đơn vị vận chuyển</span>
      <button class="sp-modal__close" onclick="closeAll()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="sp-modal__body">
      <form id="mainForm" onsubmit="doSubmit(event)">
        <input type="hidden" id="fEditId">
        <div class="sp-grid">
          <div class="sp-field" id="fIdWrap">
            <label>ID / Slug <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" id="fId" placeholder="ghn, ghtk, j_and_t" autocomplete="off">
            <small>Chữ thường, không dấu, không khoảng trắng</small>
          </div>
          <div class="sp-field">
            <label>Tên hãng <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" id="fName" placeholder="Giao Hàng Nhanh">
          </div>
          <div class="sp-field sp-field--full">
            <label>Mô tả</label>
            <input type="text" id="fDesc" placeholder="Mô tả ngắn...">
          </div>
          <div class="sp-field">
            <label>Icon URL</label>
            <input type="text" id="fIcon" placeholder="https://...">
          </div>
          <div class="sp-field">
            <label>Thứ tự hiển thị</label>
            <input type="number" id="fSort" value="0" min="0">
          </div>
          <div class="sp-field sp-field--full">
            <label class="sp-check">
              <input type="checkbox" id="fActive">
              Kích hoạt ngay sau khi tạo
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="sp-modal__foot" style="padding:16px 0 0;border-top:none">
          <button type="button" class="btn-ghost" onclick="closeAll()">Hủy</button>
          <button type="submit" class="btn-primary" id="btnOk">Tạo mới</button>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MODAL: CẤU HÌNH API -->
<div class="sp-overlay" id="ovConfig" onclick="if(e.target===this)closeAll()">
  <div class="sp-modal sp-modal--wide">
    <div class="sp-modal__head">
      <span class="sp-modal__title">Cấu hình API — <span id="cfgName"></span></span>
      <button class="sp-modal__close" onclick="closeAll()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="sp-modal__body">
      <p class="sp-hint">Lưu API key, token, shop ID vào trường <code>config</code> (JSON).</p>
      <div class="sp-field">
        <textarea id="cfgJson" class="sp-json" rows="10" spellcheck="false"></textarea>
        <div id="cfgErr" class="sp-json-err"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="sp-modal__foot">
      <button type="button" class="btn-ghost" onclick="closeAll()">Hủy</button>
      <button type="button" class="btn-primary" onclick="saveConfig()">Lưu cấu hình</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="toast" class="sp-toast"></div>

<script>
const BASE = '/admin/shipping/providers/api';
let cfgId = null;

const $  = id => document.getElementById(id);

// ── CSRF: lấy token từ meta tag (Flask-WTF inject sẵn) ──
const getCsrf = () => document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';

// ── api helper: tự động đính kèm CSRF cho mọi request ──
const api = (url, opt={}) => {
  const headers = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-CSRFToken': getCsrf(), ...opt.headers };
  return fetch(url, { ...opt, headers }).then(r => r.json());
};

const toast = (msg, ok=true) => {
  const el = $('toast');
  el.textContent = msg;
  el.className = `sp-toast show sp-toast--${ok?'ok':'err'}`;
  setTimeout(()=>el.classList.remove('show'), 3000);
};

const closeAll = () => document.querySelectorAll('.sp-overlay').forEach(o=>o.classList.remove('show'));
const openOv   = id => $(id).classList.add('show');

// ── Stats refresh ──
const refreshStats = () => {
  const rows = document.querySelectorAll('#tbody tr[data-id]');
  const on   = document.querySelectorAll('#tbody tr[data-id]:not(.sp-row--off)').length;
  $('sTotal').textContent = rows.length;
  $('sActive').textContent = on;
  $('sOff').textContent = rows.length - on;
};

// ── Add ──
const openAdd = () => {
  $('mTitle').textContent = 'Thêm đơn vị vận chuyển';
  $('btnOk').textContent  = 'Tạo mới';
  $('fEditId').value = '';
  $('mainForm').reset();
  $('fIdWrap').style.display = '';
  openOv('ovMain');
  $('fId').focus();
};

// ── Edit ──
const openEdit = async id => {
  const d = await api(`${BASE}/${id}`);
  if (!d.id) return toast('Không tải được dữ liệu', false);
  $('mTitle').textContent = 'Chỉnh sửa hãng vận chuyển';
  $('btnOk').textContent  = 'Lưu thay đổi';
  $('fEditId').value      = id;
  $('fIdWrap').style.display = 'none';
  $('fId').value    = d.id;
  $('fName').value  = d.name || '';
  $('fDesc').value  = d.description || '';
  $('fIcon').value  = d.icon || '';
  $('fSort').value  = d.sort_order ?? 0;
  $('fActive').checked = !!d.is_active;
  openOv('ovMain');
  $('fName').focus();
};

// ── Submit ──
const doSubmit = async e => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const editId = $('fEditId').value.trim();
  const body = {
    id:          $('fId').value.trim(),
    name:        $('fName').value.trim(),
    description: $('fDesc').value.trim(),
    icon:        $('fIcon').value.trim(),
    sort_order:  parseInt($('fSort').value) || 0,
    is_active:   $('fActive').checked,
  };
  const res = await api(editId ? `${BASE}/${editId}` : BASE, {
    method: editId ? 'PUT' : 'POST',
    body: JSON.stringify(body)
  });
  if (!res.success) return toast(res.message || 'Lỗi hệ thống', false);
  toast(editId ? 'Đã cập nhật!' : 'Tạo mới thành công!');
  closeAll();
  setTimeout(()=>location.reload(), 700);
};

// ── Toggle ──
const doToggle = async (id, btn) => {
  const res = await api(`${BASE}/${id}/toggle`, { method:'PATCH' });
  if (!res.success) return toast('Cập nhật thất bại', false);
  const on = res.data.is_active;
  btn.classList.toggle('sp-toggle--on', on);
  btn.textContent = '';
  const dot = document.createElement('span'); dot.className='sp-dot'; btn.appendChild(dot);
  btn.append(on ? 'Bật' : 'Tắt');
  btn.closest('tr').classList.toggle('sp-row--off', !on);
  refreshStats();
  toast(`Đã ${on?'kích hoạt':'tạm dừng'} hãng vận chuyển.`);
};

// ── Delete ──
const doDel = async (id, name) => {
  if (!confirm(`Xóa hãng "${name}"?\n\nHành động không thể hoàn tác.`)) return;
  const res = await api(`${BASE}/${id}`, { method:'DELETE' });
  if (!res.success) return toast(res.message || 'Xóa thất bại', false);
  document.querySelector(`tr[data-id="${id}"]`)?.remove();
  refreshStats();
  toast(`Đã xóa "${name}".`);
};

// ── Config ──
const openConfig = async id => {
  const d = await api(`${BASE}/${id}`);
  if (!d.id) return toast('Không tải được dữ liệu', false);
  cfgId = id;
  $('cfgName').textContent = d.name;
  $('cfgJson').value = JSON.stringify(d.config || {}, null, 2);
  $('cfgErr').textContent = '';
  openOv('ovConfig');
  $('cfgJson').focus();
};

const saveConfig = async () => {
  let parsed;
  try { parsed = JSON.parse($('cfgJson').value) }
  catch { $('cfgErr').textContent = '⚠ JSON không hợp lệ.'; return }
  const res = await api(`${BASE}/${cfgId}`, { method:'PUT', body:JSON.stringify({config:parsed}) });
  if (!res.success) return toast('Lưu thất bại', false);
  toast('Đã lưu cấu hình!');
  closeAll();
};

$('cfgJson')?.addEventListener('input', function() {
  try { JSON.parse(this.value); $('cfgErr').textContent='' }
  catch { $('cfgErr').textContent='⚠ JSON chưa hợp lệ...' }
});
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

<script>
async function testAPI(action) {
    const provider = document.getElementById('provider').value;
    const loading = document.getElementById('loading');
    const output = document.getElementById('json-output');
    
    loading.classList.remove('hidden');
    loading.classList.add('flex');
    output.textContent = '';

    const url = action === 'fee' ? '/admin/shipping/api/test-fee' : '/admin/shipping/api/test-create';
    
    // Payload giả lập gửi lên
    const payload = {
        provider: provider,
        to_district: "Quận 1",
        weight: 500
    };

    try {
        const res = await fetch(url, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token() }}' 
            },
            body: JSON.stringify(payload)
        });
        
        const data = await res.json();
        
        // Đổi màu text dựa trên Success/False
        output.className = data.success 
            ? 'text-xs font-mono text-[#a3d9b8] leading-relaxed break-all' 
            : 'text-xs font-mono text-[#f8b4c4] leading-relaxed break-all';
            
        // Hiển thị JSON format đẹp
        output.textContent = JSON.stringify(data, null, 4);
    } catch (e) {
        output.className = 'text-xs font-mono text-[#f8b4c4] leading-relaxed break-all';
        output.textContent = 'LỖI HỆ THỐNG:\n' + e.toString();
    } finally {
        loading.classList.remove('flex');
        loading.classList.add('hidden');
    }
}
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

<div id="gua-ai-chat" class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-[200] flex flex-col items-end gap-4 font-sans reveal" style="transition-delay: 500ms;">

  {# ── CỬA SỔ CHAT ── #}
  <div id="chatbot-window" 
       class="hidden w-[340px] sm:w-[380px] bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] flex-col overflow-hidden origin-bottom-right transition-all duration-300 transform scale-95 opacity-0">
    
    {# Header #}

        <div class="relative flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-white/10 rounded-full">

        </div>
        <div>

          <p class="text-[10px] text-stone-400 font-medium mt-0.5">Sẵn sàng hỗ trợ & chốt đơn</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <button onclick="toggleBot()" class="text-stone-400 hover:text-white transition-colors p-1">
        <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
      </button>
    </div>

    {# Khu vực hiển thị tin nhắn #}
    <div id="chatbot-messages" class="h-[360px] overflow-y-auto p-5 flex flex-col gap-4 bg-stone-50/50 no-scrollbar">
      <div class="flex gap-2 w-full">
        <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-stone-900 flex items-center justify-center text-white shrink-0 mt-1">

        </div>
        <div class="bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-3 shadow-sm text-sm text-stone-700 max-w-[85%] leading-relaxed">
          Xin chào! Mình là AI của GUA Maison. Mình có thể giúp bạn <b>tìm sản phẩm</b>, <b>tư vấn size</b> hoặc <b>phối đồ</b> nhé!
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    {# Input chat #}
    <div class="border-t border-stone-100 p-3 bg-white">
      <div class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-stone-50 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 focus-within:border-stone-400 focus-within:bg-white transition-colors shadow-inner">
        <input type="text" id="chatbot-input" placeholder="Hỏi AI về sản phẩm..." autocomplete="off"

               onkeypress="if(event.key === 'Enter') sendBotMessage()" />

<style>
  #chatbot-messages .product-card { animation: slideInUp 0.4s ease-out forwards; }
  @keyframes slideInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
</style>

<script>
  function toggleBot() {
    const win = document.getElementById('chatbot-window');
    const isHidden = win.classList.contains('hidden');
    
    if (isHidden) {
      win.classList.remove('hidden');
      // Thêm timeout nhỏ để CSS Transition chạy mượt
      setTimeout(() => {
        win.classList.remove('scale-95', 'opacity-0');
        win.classList.add('flex', 'scale-100', 'opacity-100');
        document.getElementById('chatbot-input').focus();
      }, 10);
    } else {
      win.classList.remove('scale-100', 'opacity-100');
      win.classList.add('scale-95', 'opacity-0');
      setTimeout(() => {
        win.classList.add('hidden');
        win.classList.remove('flex');
      }, 300);
    }
  }

  async function sendBotMessage() {
    const input = document.getElementById('chatbot-input');
    const chatBox = document.getElementById('chatbot-messages');
    const msg = input.value.trim();
    if (!msg) return;

    const csrfToken = document.querySelector('input[name="csrf_token"]')?.value || '';

    // Bong bóng User
    chatBox.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `
      <div class="flex gap-2 w-full justify-end">
        <div class="bg-stone-900 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-2.5 shadow-sm text-sm max-w-[85%] break-words">
          ${msg}
        </div>
      </div>
    `);
    input.value = '';
    chatBox.scrollTop = chatBox.scrollHeight;

    // Loading indicator
    const typingId = 'typing-' + Date.now();
    chatBox.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `
      <div id="${typingId}" class="flex gap-2 w-full">
        <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-stone-200 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 mt-1">
          <span class="w-1 h-1 bg-stone-500 rounded-full animate-ping"></span>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-3 shadow-sm flex items-center gap-1">
          <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-stone-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style="animation-delay:0ms"></span>
          <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-stone-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style="animation-delay:150ms"></span>
          <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-stone-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style="animation-delay:300ms"></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    `);
    chatBox.scrollTop = chatBox.scrollHeight;

    try {
      const res = await fetch('/api/bot', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-CSRFToken': csrfToken },
        body: JSON.stringify({ message: msg })
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      document.getElementById(typingId)?.remove();

      // Bong bóng Bot (Render HTML do Backend trả về)
      chatBox.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `
        <div class="flex gap-2 w-full">
          <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-stone-900 flex items-center justify-center text-white shrink-0 mt-1 shadow-sm">
            <svg class="w-3 h-3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.75 13.5l10.5-11.25L12 10.5h8.25L9.75 21.75 12 13.5H3.75z"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-3 shadow-sm text-sm text-stone-800 max-w-[85%] leading-relaxed">
            ${data.reply}
          </div>
        </div>
      `);
    } catch {
      document.getElementById(typingId)?.remove();
      chatBox.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `
        <div class="flex gap-2 w-full">
          <div class="bg-red-50 text-red-600 border border-red-100 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-3 text-sm">
            Hệ thống AI đang bảo trì. Vui lòng thử lại sau!
          </div>
        </div>
      `);
    }
    chatBox.scrollTop = chatBox.scrollHeight;
  }
</script>
</file>
