{# Chuyển đổi an toàn dữ liệu Jinja sang JSON để tránh báo lỗi trong VS Code #}
<script id="product_data" type="application/json">
    {{ product.product_variants | tojson | safe if product and product.product_variants else '[]' }}
</script>

<script>
/* ─── 1. TỪ ĐIỂN NHẬN DIỆN MÀU (THÔNG MINH) ─── */
const COLOR_DB = [
    {name:'Đen',hex:'#1c1917'},{name:'Trắng',hex:'#ffffff'},{name:'Xám',hex:'#78716c'},{name:'Đỏ',hex:'#ef4444'},
    {name:'Xanh dương',hex:'#3b82f6'},{name:'Xanh navy',hex:'#1e3a8a'},{name:'Xanh lá',hex:'#22c55e'},{name:'Xanh rêu',hex:'#3f6212'},
    {name:'Vàng',hex:'#eab308'},{name:'Nâu',hex:'#78350f'},{name:'Hồng',hex:'#ec4899'},{name:'Tím',hex:'#d946ef'},
    {name:'Cam',hex:'#f97316'},{name:'Be',hex:'#f5f5dc'},{name:'Kem',hex:'#fef3c7'},{name:'Bạc',hex:'#d6d3d1'}
];
const DEFAULT_SIZES = ['XS', 'S', 'M', 'L', 'XL', 'XXL', '38', '39', '40', '41', '42', '43'];

/* ─── 2. STATE MANAGER (XỬ LÝ TOÀN BỘ LOGIC UI) ─── */
let variantGroups = [];

// Đọc dữ liệu đã được parse an toàn từ thẻ script ẩn
const rawVariants = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('product_data').textContent);

if (rawVariants && rawVariants.length > 0) {
    rawVariants.forEach(v => {
        let g = variantGroups.find(g => g.colorName === v.color_name && g.colorHex === v.color_hex);
        if (!g) {
            g = { colorName: v.color_name, colorHex: v.color_hex, sizes: [] };
            variantGroups.push(g);
        }
        g.sizes.push({ size: v.size, stock: v.stock, price: v.price_override || '' });
    });
} else {
    // Trang Thêm mới -> Render 1 nhóm màu trống
    variantGroups.push({ colorName: '', colorHex: '#1c1917', sizes: [] });
}

// Hàm Render chính: Vẽ toàn bộ UI của Variant Matrix
function renderVariants() {
    const container = document.getElementById('variant-groups-container');
    container.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Lấy giá gốc để làm Placeholder
    const basePrice = document.getElementById('base_price').value;
    const pricePlaceholder = basePrice ? `Giá gốc: ${parseInt(basePrice).toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ` : 'Bằng giá niêm yết';

    variantGroups.forEach((g, gIdx) => {
        // Render Size Chips
        const sizeChips = DEFAULT_SIZES.map(s => {
            const isActive = g.sizes.some(sz => sz.size === s);
            return `<button type="button" onclick="toggleSize(${gIdx}, '${s}')" class="h-9 px-3.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold border-2 transition-all duration-200 ${isActive ? 'bg-stone-900 text-white border-stone-900' : 'bg-white text-stone-400 border-stone-200 hover:border-stone-400 hover:text-stone-900'}">${s}</button>`;
        }).join('');

        // Render List Nhập Tồn kho & Giá
        let rowsHtml = '';
        if (g.sizes.length > 0) {
            const rows = g.sizes.map((sz, sIdx) => `
                <div class="grid grid-cols-12 gap-4 items-center py-4 border-t border-stone-100">
                    <input type="hidden" name="v_color[]" value="${g.colorName}">
                    <input type="hidden" name="v_color_hex[]" value="${g.colorHex}">
                    <input type="hidden" name="v_size[]" value="${sz.size}">

                    <div class="col-span-2 flex items-center justify-center">
                        <span class="px-4 py-2 bg-stone-100 text-stone-900 text-xs font-black rounded-lg uppercase tracking-wider">${sz.size}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-span-4 relative">
                        <span class="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-[10px] font-black text-stone-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Kho <span class="text-red-500">*</span></span>
                        <input type="number" name="v_stock[]" value="${sz.stock}" min="0" required onchange="updateSizeData(${gIdx}, ${sIdx}, 'stock', this.value)" class="w-full h-11 pl-20 pr-4 bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold text-stone-900 outline-none focus:border-stone-900 transition-colors shadow-sm">
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-span-5 relative">
                        <span class="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-[10px] font-black text-stone-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Giá</span>
                        <input type="number" name="v_price_override[]" value="${sz.price}" onchange="updateSizeData(${gIdx}, ${sIdx}, 'price', this.value)" placeholder="${pricePlaceholder}" class="w-full h-11 pl-[3.25rem] pr-4 bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold text-stone-900 outline-none focus:border-stone-900 transition-colors shadow-sm placeholder-stone-300">
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-span-1 flex justify-end">
                        <button type="button" onclick="toggleSize(${gIdx}, '${sz.size}')" class="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-stone-300 hover:bg-rose-50 hover:text-rose-500 transition-all" title="Bỏ size này">
                            <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            rowsHtml = `
                <div class="mt-8 bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-[1.5rem] p-5 shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgb(0,0,0,0.02)]">
                    <p class="text-[10px] font-black text-stone-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2 ml-2">Nhập số lượng & giá cho từng Size</p>
                    ${rows}
                </div>
            `;
        }

        // Dựng HTML cho cả khối Group
        const html = `
            <div class="bg-stone-50/70 border border-stone-100 rounded-[2rem] p-6 relative group/card">
                ${variantGroups.length > 1 ? `<button type="button" onclick="removeGroup(${gIdx})" class="absolute top-6 right-6 w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-white border border-stone-200 text-stone-300 hover:text-rose-500 hover:border-rose-200 flex items-center justify-center transition-all shadow-sm opacity-0 group-hover/card:opacity-100" title="Xóa nhóm màu này"><svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M14.74 9l-.34 12m-4.72 0l-.34-12M4.5 6.375h15m-15 0A2.25 2.25 0 005.25 9h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0021 6.375m-15 0V4.5a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25h4.5A2.25 2.25 0 0116.5 4.5v1.875"/></svg></button>` : ''}

                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-12 gap-8 items-start">
                    <div class="xl:col-span-4">
                        <label class="block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-900 mb-3">1. Định danh Màu <span class="text-red-500">*</span></label>
                        <div class="flex gap-3 items-center relative">
                            <label class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl border-2 border-stone-200 shadow-sm shrink-0 cursor-pointer overflow-hidden transition-transform hover:scale-105" style="background-color: ${g.colorHex}">
                                <input type="color" value="${g.colorHex}" onchange="updateGroupColor(${gIdx}, 'hex', this.value)" class="opacity-0 w-full h-full cursor-pointer">
                            </label>
                            <div class="relative flex-1">
                                <input type="text" value="${g.colorName}" required oninput="suggestColor(this, ${gIdx})" onchange="updateGroupColor(${gIdx}, 'name', this.value)" placeholder="Tên màu (VD: Đen)" class="w-full h-12 bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl px-4 text-sm font-bold text-stone-900 outline-none focus:border-stone-900 transition-all shadow-sm">
                                <div id="suggest-${gIdx}" class="absolute top-full left-0 right-0 bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl shadow-xl z-50 mt-2 hidden max-h-48 overflow-y-auto p-2"></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="xl:col-span-8">
                        <label class="block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-900 mb-3">2. Kích thước của màu này <span class="text-stone-400 font-medium normal-case tracking-normal ml-2">(Click để bật/tắt)</span></label>
                        <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                            ${sizeChips}
                            <div class="flex items-center border-2 border-stone-200 rounded-xl bg-white overflow-hidden h-9 focus-within:border-stone-900 transition-colors ml-2">
                                <input type="text" id="custom-size-${gIdx}" placeholder="Cỡ khác..." class="w-20 h-full px-3 text-xs font-bold outline-none uppercase placeholder-stone-400" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'){event.preventDefault(); addCustomSize(${gIdx});}">
                                <button type="button" onclick="addCustomSize(${gIdx})" class="px-3 bg-stone-50 text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-900 font-black border-l-2 border-stone-200 hover:bg-stone-200 transition-colors h-full">+</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                ${rowsHtml}
            </div>
        `;
        container.innerHTML += html;
    });
}

/* Các hàm thay đổi State */
function addGroup() {
    variantGroups.push({ colorName: '', colorHex: '#1c1917', sizes: [] });
    renderVariants();
}
function removeGroup(idx) {
    variantGroups.splice(idx, 1);
    if(variantGroups.length === 0) addGroup(); // Luôn giữ ít nhất 1 group
    else renderVariants();
}
function toggleSize(gIdx, sizeName) {
    const group = variantGroups[gIdx];
    const existingIdx = group.sizes.findIndex(s => s.size === sizeName);
    if (existingIdx >= 0) {
        group.sizes.splice(existingIdx, 1); // Đã có -> Xóa
    } else {
        group.sizes.push({ size: sizeName, stock: 0, price: '' }); // Chưa có -> Thêm
    }
    renderVariants();
}
function addCustomSize(gIdx) {
    const input = document.getElementById(`custom-size-${gIdx}`);
    const val = input.value.trim().toUpperCase();
    if(val && val.length <= 8) {
        toggleSize(gIdx, val);
    }
}
function updateGroupColor(gIdx, type, val) {
    if (type === 'hex') variantGroups[gIdx].colorHex = val;
    if (type === 'name') variantGroups[gIdx].colorName = val;
    renderVariants(); // Re-render để update màu Background
}
function updateSizeData(gIdx, sIdx, field, val) {
    variantGroups[gIdx].sizes[sIdx][field] = val;
}

/* ─── 3. GỢI Ý MÀU SẮC AUTOCOMPLETE ─── */
function suggestColor(input, gIdx) {
    const val = input.value.toLowerCase().trim();
    const box = document.getElementById(`suggest-${gIdx}`);
    if (!val) { box.classList.add('hidden'); return; }
    
    const matches = COLOR_DB.filter(c => c.name.toLowerCase().includes(val));
    if (!matches.length) { box.classList.add('hidden'); return; }
    
    box.innerHTML = matches.slice(0,6).map(c => `
        <button type="button" onclick="pickColor(${gIdx}, '${c.hex}', '${c.name}')" class="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 hover:bg-stone-50 rounded-xl transition-colors text-left">
            <span class="w-5 h-5 rounded-md border border-stone-200 shadow-sm shrink-0" style="background:${c.hex}"></span>
            <span class="text-xs font-bold text-stone-900">${c.name}</span>
        </button>`).join('');
    box.classList.remove('hidden');
}
function pickColor(gIdx, hex, name) {
    variantGroups[gIdx].colorHex = hex;
    variantGroups[gIdx].colorName = name;
    renderVariants();
}
// Đóng suggest khi click ngoài
document.addEventListener('click', e => {
    if (!e.target.closest('[id^="suggest-"]') && !e.target.closest('input[type="text"]')) {
        document.querySelectorAll('[id^="suggest-"]').forEach(b => b.classList.add('hidden'));
    }
});

/* ─── 4. HÌNH ẢNH & UPLOAD ─── */
function handleFileSelect(input) {
    Array.from(input.files).forEach(f => {
        const r = new FileReader();
        r.onload = e => renderImagePreview(e.target.result, true);
        r.readAsDataURL(f);
    });
    document.getElementById('images-synced').value = '1';
}
function addPhotoByUrl() {
    const input = document.getElementById('urlInput');
    const url = input.value.trim();
    if (!url || !url.startsWith('http')) return;
    renderImagePreview(url, false);
    input.value = '';
    document.getElementById('images-synced').value = '1';
}
function renderImagePreview(url, isFile) {
    const container = document.getElementById('image-preview-container');
    const isFirst = container.children.length === 0;
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'relative group aspect-[3/4] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-stone-200 shadow-sm img-card';
    div.innerHTML = `
        <img src="${url}" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
        ${isFile ? '' : `<input type="hidden" name="image_urls" value="${url}">`}
        <button type="button" onclick="removeImage(this)" class="absolute top-2 right-2 bg-white/90 text-rose-500 w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all shadow-md hover:bg-rose-500 hover:text-white z-10"><svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"/></svg></button>
        ${isFirst ? '<div class="cover-badge absolute bottom-0 inset-x-0 bg-stone-900/90 backdrop-blur-sm text-white text-[9px] font-black text-center py-2 uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">Ảnh Bìa</div>' : ''}
    `;
    container.appendChild(div);
}
function removeImage(btn) {
    const container = document.getElementById('image-preview-container');
    btn.closest('.img-card').remove();
    const first = container.querySelector('.img-card');
    if (first && !first.querySelector('.cover-badge')) {
        const badge = document.createElement('div');
        badge.className = 'cover-badge absolute bottom-0 inset-x-0 bg-stone-900/90 backdrop-blur-sm text-white text-[9px] font-black text-center py-2 uppercase tracking-[0.2em]';
        badge.innerText = 'Ảnh Bìa';
        first.appendChild(badge);
    }
    document.getElementById('images-synced').value = '1';
}

/* ─── 5. VALIDATION & SYNC ─── */
function syncVariantPricePlaceholders() {
    const basePrice = document.getElementById('base_price').value;
    const lbl = basePrice ? `Giá gốc: ${parseInt(basePrice).toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ` : 'Bằng giá niêm yết';
    document.querySelectorAll('[name="v_price_override[]"]').forEach(i => i.placeholder = lbl);
}

document.getElementById('productForm').onsubmit = function(e) {
    const bp = document.getElementById('base_price');
    const err = document.getElementById('price-error');
    if (!bp.value || parseFloat(bp.value) <= 0) {
        e.preventDefault();
        err.classList.remove('hidden');
        bp.style.borderColor = '#ef4444';
        bp.focus();
        return false;
    }
    
    // Kiểm tra xem đã có ít nhất 1 size được chọn chưa
    const hasAnySize = variantGroups.some(g => g.sizes.length > 0);
    if(!hasAnySize) {
        e.preventDefault();
        alert("⚠ Vui lòng chọn ít nhất 1 kích thước cho sản phẩm!");
        return false;
    }
    return true;
};

// Khởi chạy khi load trang
renderVariants();
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

                  {{ p.categories.name if p.categories else '—' }}
                </span>
              </td>

              {# Giá #}
              <td class="px-6 py-4">
                <p class="font-bold text-[#1a1a1a] text-sm tabular-nums">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(p.price) }} <span class="text-[#a09890] font-medium text-[10px]">₫</span></p>
              </td>

              {# Tồn kho #}
              <td class="px-6 py-4 text-center">
                {% if p.stock == 0 %}
                  <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 bg-[#fce8ec] text-[#e11d48] border border-[#f8b4c4] rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide">
                    <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-[#e11d48]"></span> Hết hàng
                  </span>
                {% elif p.stock <= 5 %}
                  <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 bg-[#fdf3e6] text-[#b45309] border border-[#f5d9b3] rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide">
                    <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-[#b45309]"></span> Dưới 5
                  </span>
                {% else %}
                  <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 bg-[#e8f5ee] text-[#2d6a4f] border border-[#a3d9b8] rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide">
                    <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-[#2d6a4f]"></span> {{ p.stock }}
                  </span>
                {% endif %}
              </td>

              {# Trạng thái #}
              <td class="px-6 py-4 text-center">
                {% if p.deleted_at %}
                  <span class="px-2.5 py-1 bg-stone-100 text-stone-500 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider line-through">Đã xóa</span>
                {% elif p.is_active %}
                  <span class="px-2.5 py-1 bg-white border border-[#e8e4de] text-[#1a1a1a] rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Đang bán</span>
                {% else %}
                  <span class="px-2.5 py-1 bg-white border border-[#ddd8d0] text-[#a09890] rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Tạm ẩn</span>
                {% endif %}
              </td>

              {# Thao tác #}
              <td class="px-6 py-4">
                <div class="flex items-center justify-end gap-2">
                  {% if p.slug and not p.deleted_at %}
                  <a href="/product/{{ p.slug }}" target="_blank" title="Xem trên cửa hàng"
                     class="w-8 h-8 rounded-xl bg-white border border-[#e8e4de] text-[#7a7168] flex items-center justify-center hover:border-[#1a1a1a] hover:text-[#1a1a1a] transition-all">
                    <svg class="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M13.5 6H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 003 8.25v10.5A2.25 2.25 0 005.25 21h10.5A2.25 2.25 0 0018 18.75V10.5m-10.5 6L21 3m0 0h-5.25M21 3v5.25"/></svg>
                  </a>
                  {% endif %}
                  
                  <a href="{{ url_for('admin.edit_product', pid=p.id) }}" title="Sửa sản phẩm"
                     class="w-8 h-8 rounded-xl bg-white border border-[#e8e4de] text-[#7a7168] flex items-center justify-center hover:border-[#2d6a4f] hover:text-[#2d6a4f] hover:bg-[#e8f5ee] transition-all">
                    <svg class="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16.862 4.487l1.687-1.688a1.875 1.875 0 112.652 2.652L10.582 16.07a4.5 4.5 0 01-1.897 1.13L6 18l.8-2.685a4.5 4.5 0 011.13-1.897l8.932-8.931zm0 0L19.5 7.125M18 14v4.75A2.25 2.25 0 0115.75 21H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 013 18.75V8.25A2.25 2.25 0 015.25 6H10"/></svg>
                  </a>
                  
                  {# NÚT XÓA Ở TABLE VIEW #}
                  {% if not p.deleted_at %}
                  <form action="{{ url_for('admin.delete_product', pid=p.id) }}" method="POST" class="inline m-0"
                        onsubmit="return confirm('Chuyển sản phẩm vào thùng rác?\n(Các đơn hàng cũ chứa sản phẩm này không bị ảnh hưởng)')">
                    <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
                    <button type="submit" title="Xóa"
                            class="w-8 h-8 rounded-xl bg-white border border-[#e8e4de] text-[#7a7168] flex items-center justify-center hover:border-[#e11d48] hover:text-[#e11d48] hover:bg-[#fce8ec] transition-all">
                      <svg class="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M14.74 9l-.34 12m-4.72 0l-.34-12M4.5 6.375h15m-15 0A2.25 2.25 0 005.25 9h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0021 6.375m-15 0V4.5a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25h4.5A2.25 2.25 0 0116.5 4.5v1.875"/></svg>
                    </button>
                  </form>
                  {% endif %}
                </div>
              </td>
            </tr>
            {% else %}
            <tr>
              <td colspan="7" class="px-6 py-32 text-center bg-[#fafaf8]">
                <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4">
                  <div class="w-16 h-16 bg-white border border-[#e8e4de] rounded-3xl flex items-center justify-center text-[#c8c0b4] shadow-sm">
                    <svg class="w-8 h-8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M20.25 7.5l-.625 10.632a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.247 2.118H6.622a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.247-2.118L3.75 7.5M10 11.25h4M3.375 7.5h17.25c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125v-1.5c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H3.375c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125z"/></svg>
                  </div>
                  <p class="text-xs font-bold text-[#7a7168]">Kho hàng trống hoặc không tìm thấy kết quả.</p>
                  <a href="{{ url_for('admin.add_product') }}" class="text-[11px] font-black text-[#1a1a1a] hover:text-[#2d6a4f] underline underline-offset-4 transition-colors">Tạo sản phẩm mới</a>
                </div>
              </td>
            </tr>
            {% endfor %}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>

    {# ── GRID VIEW ── #}
    <div id="view-grid" class="hidden grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-5 fade-up delay-2">
      {% for p in products %}
      <div class="gua-card p-0 overflow-hidden group flex flex-col {% if p.deleted_at %}opacity-50 grayscale-[40%]{% endif %} hover:shadow-md transition-all relative">
        
        <div class="aspect-[3/4] overflow-hidden bg-[#f0ede8] border-b border-[#e8e4de] relative">
          <img src="{{ p.thumbnail_url or 'https://placehold.co/300x400/fafaf8/c8c0b4?text=No+Image' }}"
               alt="{{ p.name }}" class="w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500">
          
          {# Badges #}
          <div class="absolute top-3 left-3 flex flex-col gap-1.5">
            {% if p.deleted_at %}
              <span class="px-2 py-1 bg-[#1a1a1a] text-white rounded-md text-[8px] font-black uppercase shadow-sm">Đã xóa</span>
            {% elif not p.is_active %}
              <span class="px-2 py-1 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur border border-[#e8e4de] text-[#7a7168] rounded-md text-[8px] font-black uppercase shadow-sm">Đang ẩn</span>
            {% elif p.stock == 0 %}
              <span class="px-2 py-1 bg-[#e11d48] text-white rounded-md text-[8px] font-black uppercase shadow-sm">Hết hàng</span>
            {% endif %}
          </div>
          {% if p.is_featured %}
          <div class="absolute top-3 right-3">
            <span class="w-6 h-6 bg-[#b45309] rounded-md flex items-center justify-center text-white text-xs shadow-sm">★</span>
          </div>
          {% endif %}

          {# Hover actions (Bao gồm cả nút Edit, View và DELETE) #}
          <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-[#1a1a1a]/60 backdrop-blur-[2px] opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
            <a href="{{ url_for('admin.edit_product', pid=p.id) }}" title="Sửa"
               class="w-10 h-10 bg-white rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-[#1a1a1a] hover:bg-[#2d6a4f] hover:text-white transition-all shadow-lg hover:scale-110 active:scale-95">
              <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16.862 4.487l1.687-1.688a1.875 1.875 0 112.652 2.652L10.582 16.07a4.5 4.5 0 01-1.897 1.13L6 18l.8-2.685a4.5 4.5 0 011.13-1.897l8.932-8.931z"/></svg>
            </a>
            
            {% if p.slug and not p.deleted_at %}
            <a href="/product/{{ p.slug }}" target="_blank" title="Xem Storefront"
               class="w-10 h-10 bg-white rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-[#1a1a1a] hover:bg-[#1a1a1a] hover:text-white transition-all shadow-lg hover:scale-110 active:scale-95">
              <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M13.5 6H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 003 8.25v10.5A2.25 2.25 0 005.25 21h10.5A2.25 2.25 0 0018 18.75V10.5m-10.5 6L21 3m0 0h-5.25M21 3v5.25"/></svg>
            </a>
            {% endif %}

            {# NÚT XÓA Ở GRID VIEW #}
            {% if not p.deleted_at %}
            <form action="{{ url_for('admin.delete_product', pid=p.id) }}" method="POST" class="m-0"
                  onsubmit="return confirm('Chuyển sản phẩm vào thùng rác?\n(Các đơn hàng cũ chứa sản phẩm này không bị ảnh hưởng)')">
              <input type="hidden" name="csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token() }}">
              <button type="submit" title="Xóa"
                      class="w-10 h-10 bg-white rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-[#1a1a1a] hover:bg-[#e11d48] hover:text-white transition-all shadow-lg hover:scale-110 active:scale-95">
                <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M14.74 9l-.34 12m-4.72 0l-.34-12M4.5 6.375h15m-15 0A2.25 2.25 0 005.25 9h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0021 6.375m-15 0V4.5a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25h4.5A2.25 2.25 0 0116.5 4.5v1.875"/></svg>
              </button>
            </form>
            {% endif %}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="p-4 flex flex-col flex-1 bg-[#fafaf8]">
          <p class="font-bold text-[#1a1a1a] text-xs truncate leading-snug">{{ p.name }}</p>
          <p class="text-[11px] text-[#7a7168] font-bold mt-1 mb-3">{{ "{:,.0f}".format(p.price) }} ₫</p>
          
          <div class="mt-auto flex items-center justify-between border-t border-[#e8e4de] pt-3">
            <span class="text-[9px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded border 
              {% if p.stock == 0 %}border-[#f8b4c4] text-[#e11d48] bg-[#fce8ec]{% elif p.stock <= 5 %}border-[#f5d9b3] text-[#b45309] bg-[#fdf3e6]{% else %}border-[#a3d9b8] text-[#2d6a4f] bg-[#e8f5ee]{% endif %}">
              {{ 'Hết hàng' if p.stock == 0 else ('Kho: ' + p.stock|string) }}
            </span>
            <span class="text-[9px] text-[#a09890] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">{{ p.categories.name if p.categories else '—' }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      {% else %}
      <div class="col-span-full py-24 text-center text-[#a09890] font-bold text-sm">Chưa có sản phẩm nào.</div>
      {% endfor %}
    </div>

    {# ── PHÂN TRANG ── #}
    {% if total_pages > 1 %}
    <div class="flex justify-center items-center gap-2 mt-8 fade-up delay-3">
      {% if page > 1 %}
      <a href="{{ url_for('admin.products', page=page-1, q=current_q, status=current_status) }}"
         class="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-white border border-[#e8e4de] text-[#7a7168] hover:bg-[#fafaf8] hover:text-[#1a1a1a] transition-all shadow-sm">
        <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.75 19.5L8.25 12l7.5-7.5"/></svg>
      </a>
      {% endif %}

      {% for pg in range(1, total_pages + 1) %}
        {% if pg == page %}
          <span class="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-[#1a1a1a] text-white text-sm font-bold shadow-md">{{ pg }}</span>
        {% elif pg == 1 or pg == total_pages or (pg >= page - 2 and pg <= page + 2) %}
          <a href="{{ url_for('admin.products', page=pg, q=current_q, status=current_status) }}"
             class="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-white text-[#7a7168] border border-[#e8e4de] hover:bg-[#fafaf8] hover:text-[#1a1a1a] text-sm font-bold transition-all shadow-sm">{{ pg }}</a>
        {% elif pg == page - 3 or pg == page + 3 %}
          <span class="text-[#bbb5ac] font-bold px-1">…</span>
        {% endif %}
      {% endfor %}

      {% if page < total_pages %}
      <a href="{{ url_for('admin.products', page=page+1, q=current_q, status=current_status) }}"
         class="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-white border border-[#e8e4de] text-[#7a7168] hover:bg-[#fafaf8] hover:text-[#1a1a1a] transition-all shadow-sm">
        <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.25 4.5l7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"/></svg>
      </a>
      {% endif %}
    </div>
    {% endif %}

  </div>
</div>

<script>
// View toggle (table / grid) logic
function setView(mode) {
    const tableEl = document.getElementById('view-table');
    const gridEl  = document.getElementById('view-grid');
    const btnT    = document.getElementById('btn-table');
    const btnG    = document.getElementById('btn-grid');

    if (mode === 'grid') {
        tableEl.classList.add('hidden');
        gridEl.classList.remove('hidden');
        btnG.classList.add('bg-white', 'shadow-sm', 'text-[#1a1a1a]');
        btnG.classList.remove('text-[#9a9189]', 'hover:text-[#1a1a1a]');
        btnT.classList.remove('bg-white', 'shadow-sm', 'text-[#1a1a1a]');
        btnT.classList.add('text-[#9a9189]', 'hover:text-[#1a1a1a]');
    } else {
        gridEl.classList.add('hidden');
        tableEl.classList.remove('hidden');
        btnT.classList.add('bg-white', 'shadow-sm', 'text-[#1a1a1a]');
        btnT.classList.remove('text-[#9a9189]', 'hover:text-[#1a1a1a]');
        btnG.classList.remove('bg-white', 'shadow-sm', 'text-[#1a1a1a]');
        btnG.classList.add('text-[#9a9189]', 'hover:text-[#1a1a1a]');
    }
    localStorage.setItem('productView', mode);
}

// Restore user's last preferred view
const savedView = localStorage.getItem('productView');
if (savedView === 'grid') setView('grid');
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

      <div class="w-20 h-20 bg-stone-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-stone-300 mb-6">

      <a href="/shop" class="bg-stone-900 text-white px-8 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold shadow-md hover:bg-stone-800 active:scale-95 transition-all">

<style>
  .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: all 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); }
  .reveal.active { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
</style>

<script>
  // Hiệu ứng Fade in
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach((el) => {
      setTimeout(() => el.classList.add('active'), 50);
    });
  });

  // Tăng giảm số lượng sản phẩm an toàn (Chống vượt kho)
  function thayDoiSoLuong(nut, thayDoi) {
    const form = nut.closest('form');
    const input = form.querySelector('input[name="quantity"]');
    const maxStock = parseInt(input.max) || 999;
    const giaTriMoi = parseInt(input.value) + thayDoi;

    if (giaTriMoi > maxStock) {
      alert(`Xin lỗi, sản phẩm này chỉ còn ${maxStock} chiếc trong kho!`);
      return;
    }

    if (giaTriMoi >= 0 && giaTriMoi !== parseInt(input.value)) {
      input.value = giaTriMoi;
      form.submit();
    }
  }

  // Khách gõ số bằng tay cũng chặn lố kho
  function kiemTraTonKho(input) {
    const maxStock = parseInt(input.max) || 999;
    if (parseInt(input.value) > maxStock) {
        alert(`Xin lỗi, sản phẩm này chỉ còn ${maxStock} chiếc trong kho!`);
        input.value = maxStock;
    }
    input.form.submit();
  }

  // Ẩn mũi tên lên xuống của thẻ input type=number
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const style = document.createElement('style');
    style.textContent = `
      input[type=number]::-webkit-inner-spin-button,
      input[type=number]::-webkit-outer-spin-button { -webkit-appearance: none; margin: 0; }
      input[type=number] { -moz-appearance: textfield; }
    `;
    document.head.appendChild(style);
  });
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

  {# ══════════════════════ SCRIPTS ══════════════════════ #}
  <script>
  /* ── Checkout namespace ── */
  const Checkout = (() => {
    const PAYMENT_MAP = {
      COD:   { label: 'id="pay-cod"',   btnText: 'Hoàn tất đặt hàng (COD)' },
      VNPAY: { label: 'id="pay-vnpay"', btnText: 'Thanh toán qua VNPay'    },
    };

    function selectAddress(id) {
      document.querySelectorAll('.address-item').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('is-active'));
      document.getElementById('label-' + id)?.classList.add('is-active');
      document.querySelector(`input[value="${id}"]`).checked = true;
    }

    function selectPayment(method) {
      ['COD', 'VNPAY'].forEach(m => {
        document.getElementById('pay-' + m.toLowerCase())?.classList.remove('is-active');
      });
      document.getElementById('pay-' + method.toLowerCase())?.classList.add('is-active');
      document.querySelector(`input[value="${method}"]`).checked = true;
      document.getElementById('btn-text').innerText = method === 'VNPAY'
        ? 'Thanh toán qua VNPay' : 'Hoàn tất đặt hàng (COD)';
    }

    function handleSubmit(e) {
      const btn  = document.getElementById('btn-submit');
      const text = document.getElementById('btn-text');
      const icon = document.getElementById('btn-icon');
      if (btn.disabled) { e.preventDefault(); return; }
      btn.disabled = true;
      btn.classList.add('loading');
      text.innerText = 'Đang xử lý...';
      icon.className = 'fa-solid fa-circle-notch fa-spin';
    }

    return { selectAddress, selectPayment, handleSubmit };
  })();

  /* ── Coupon namespace ── */
  const Coupon = (() => {
    const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);

    function setMsg(text, type) {
      const el = $('coupon-msg');
      el.innerText = text;
      el.className = `coupon-msg ${type}`;
    }

    function setLoading(on) {
      const btn = $('btn-coupon');
      btn.disabled  = on;
      btn.innerHTML = on ? '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch fa-spin"></i>' : 'Áp dụng';
    }

    async function apply() {
      const code = $('coupon-input').value.trim().toUpperCase();
      if (!code) { setMsg('⚠ Vui lòng nhập mã để áp dụng.', 'err'); return; }

      setLoading(true);
      try {
        const res  = await fetch('/cart/apply-coupon', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token() }}' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ code }),
        });
        const data = await res.json();

        if (data.valid) {
          setMsg(`✓ Áp dụng thành công! Giảm ${data.discount.toLocaleString()}₫`, 'ok');
          $('discount-row').classList.remove('hidden');
          $('coupon-label').innerText   = data.code;
          $('discount-amount').innerText = data.discount.toLocaleString();
          $('final-total').innerText    = data.final_total.toLocaleString() + ' ₫';
          $('hidden-coupon-code').value = data.code;
          $('coupon-input').disabled    = true;
          $('btn-coupon').style.display = 'none';
        } else {
          setMsg(`✕ ${data.error}`, 'err');
          $('discount-row').classList.add('hidden');
          $('hidden-coupon-code').value = '';
          setLoading(false);
        }
      } catch {
        setMsg('Lỗi kết nối. Vui lòng thử lại.', 'err');
        setLoading(false);
      }
    }

    return { apply };
  })();
  </script>
  {% endblock %}
</file>

}

{# ══════════ SCRIPT ══════════ #}
<script>
(function(){
"use strict";

var hasImage = false;

/* ── Xem trước ảnh ── */
window.previewImage = function(input) {
  if (!input.files || !input.files[0]) return;
  var reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = function(e) {
    document.getElementById('image-preview').src = e.target.result;
    document.getElementById('image-preview').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('upload-placeholder').style.opacity = '0';
    document.getElementById('upload-badge').classList.remove('hidden');
    document.getElementById('remove-img-btn').classList.remove('hidden');
    hasImage = true;
    updateChecklist();
  };
  reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
};

/* ── Xoá ảnh ── */
window.removeImage = function(e) {
  e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation();
  document.getElementById('image-preview').src = '';
  document.getElementById('image-preview').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('upload-placeholder').style.opacity = '1';
  document.getElementById('upload-badge').classList.add('hidden');
  document.getElementById('remove-img-btn').classList.add('hidden');
  document.getElementById('user-image').value = '';
  hasImage = false;
  updateChecklist();
};

/* ── Cập nhật checklist ── */
function updateChecklist() {
  var imgItem = document.getElementById('check-img');
  if (!imgItem) return;
  if (hasImage) {
    imgItem.classList.add('lab-checklist__item--done');
    imgItem.innerHTML = '<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none"><circle cx="6" cy="6" r="5.5" stroke="currentColor"/><path d="M3.5 6l2 2 3-3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg> Ảnh đã tải lên';
  } else {
    imgItem.classList.remove('lab-checklist__item--done');
    imgItem.innerHTML = '<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none"><circle cx="6" cy="6" r="5.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-dasharray="2 2"/></svg> Ảnh (tuỳ chọn)';
  }
}

/* ── Chuyển tab ── */
window.switchTab = function(name) {
  ['recommend','tryon'].forEach(function(k) {
    document.getElementById('tab-'+k).classList.toggle('lab-tab--active', k===name);
    document.getElementById('content-'+k).classList.toggle('hidden', k!==name);
  });
};

/* ── Các bước tải ── */
var STEPS = [
  {p:10, t:'Đang quét hình thể...', d:'Nhận diện tỉ lệ và số đo cơ thể'},
  {p:28, t:'Áp dụng phong cách đã chọn', d:'Khớp với tiêu chí phong cách của bạn'},
  {p:50, t:'Tìm kiếm sản phẩm phù hợp', d:'Lọc qua 500+ sản phẩm GUA Maison'},
  {p:72, t:'Tính toán điểm phù hợp', d:'Chạy thuật toán tương thích AI'},
  {p:90, t:'Đang dựng bộ trang phục', d:'Chuẩn bị hiển thị kết quả'},
  {p:100,t:'Hoàn tất!',              d:'Kết quả sẵn sàng'}
];

function applyStep(s) {
  var c=188, off=c-(s.p/100)*c;
  document.getElementById('loading-percent').textContent=s.p+'%';
  document.getElementById('loading-bar').style.width=s.p+'%';
  document.getElementById('loading-step-title').textContent=s.t;
  document.getElementById('loading-step-desc').textContent=s.d;
  var fc=document.getElementById('loader-circle');
  if(fc) fc.style.strokeDashoffset=off;
}

function fakeProgress(cb) {
  var i=0;
  var tid=setInterval(function(){
    if(i>=STEPS.length){clearInterval(tid);cb();return}
    applyStep(STEPS[i++]);
  },540);
}

/* ── Ẩn/hiện trạng thái ── */
function show(id) {
  ['ai-empty','ai-loading','ai-error','content-recommend','content-tryon'].forEach(function(s){
    document.getElementById(s).classList.add('hidden');
  });
  document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('hidden');
}

/* ── Định dạng giá tiền Việt Nam ── */
function vnd(n) { return n.toLocaleString('vi-VN')+'&nbsp;₫'; }

/* ── Vẽ thẻ sản phẩm ── */
function renderCards(items) {
  var g=document.getElementById('recommendation-grid');
  g.innerHTML='';
  items.forEach(function(item,i){
    var main=i===0;
    var bdg=item.badge
      ?('<span class="lab-card__badge'+(main?' lab-card__badge--main':'')+'">'+item.badge+'</span>')
      :'';
    var el=document.createElement('a');
    el.href='/product/'+item.id;
    el.className='lab-card'+(main?' lab-card--main':'');
    el.innerHTML=
      '<div class="lab-card__img">'+
        '<img src="'+item.image+'" alt="'+item.name+'" loading="lazy">'+bdg+
      '</div>'+
      '<div class="lab-card__body">'+
        '<span class="lab-card__cat">'+item.category+'</span>'+
        '<p class="lab-card__name">'+item.name+'</p>'+
        (item.reason?'<p class="lab-card__reason">'+item.reason+'</p>':'')+
        '<div class="lab-card__foot">'+
          '<span class="lab-card__price">'+item.price.toLocaleString('vi-VN')+' ₫</span>'+
          '<span class="lab-card__score">'+item.match_score+'% phù hợp</span>'+
        '</div>'+
      '</div>';
    g.appendChild(el);
  });
}

/* ── Vẽ vòng điểm ── */
function drawScore(score) {
  var arc=document.getElementById('score-arc');
  var lbl=document.getElementById('overall-score');
  if(!arc) return;
  requestAnimationFrame(function(){
    arc.style.strokeDashoffset=150-(score/100)*150;
    lbl.textContent=score+'%';
  });
}

/* ── Máy AI chính ── */
window.runAIEngine = function() {
  var btn=document.getElementById('btn-analyze');
  var ico=document.getElementById('icon-analyze');
  var txt=document.getElementById('text-analyze');
  var scn=document.getElementById('scanner-line');

  btn.disabled=true;
  ico.classList.add('spin');
  txt.textContent='Đang xử lý...';
  scn.classList.remove('hidden');
  show('ai-loading');
  applyStep(STEPS[0]);

  fakeProgress(async function(){
    try{
      var vibe=(document.querySelector('input[name="style_vibe"]:checked')||{}).value||'streetwear';
      var csrf=(document.querySelector('input[name="csrf_token"]')||{}).value||'';
      var resp=await fetch('/api/recommend_outfit',{
        method:'POST',
        headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','X-CSRFToken':csrf},
        body:JSON.stringify({product_id:null,vibe:vibe})
      });
      if(!resp.ok) throw new Error('Lỗi máy chủ ('+resp.status+')');
      var res=await resp.json();
      if(res.status!=='success') throw new Error(res.message||'Lỗi không xác định');

      var p=res.style_profile||{};
      document.getElementById('profile-name').textContent=p.label||vibe;
      document.getElementById('profile-desc').textContent=p.desc||'';
      document.getElementById('total-price').innerHTML=vnd(res.total_look_price||0);
      renderCards(res.data||[]);
      drawScore(res.overall_match||0);
      show('content-recommend');

    }catch(err){
      console.error('[GUA AI]',err);
      document.getElementById('error-message').textContent=err.message;
      show('ai-error');
    }finally{
      btn.disabled=false;
      ico.classList.remove('spin');
      txt.textContent='✨ Phân tích & Gợi ý trang phục';
      scn.classList.add('hidden');
    }
  });
};

/* ── Khởi tạo checklist theo dõi vibe ── */
document.querySelectorAll('input[name="style_vibe"]').forEach(function(r){
  r.addEventListener('change', function(){
    var ci=document.getElementById('check-style');
    if(ci){
      ci.classList.add('lab-checklist__item--done');
    }
  });
});

})();
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

<file path="app/templates/partials/navbar.html">

    </a>

    {% for cat in global_categories %}
    <a href="/shop?category={{ cat.slug }}"
       class="text-white text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight py-2 hover:text-stone-400 transition-colors">
      {{ cat.name }}
    </a>

  /* Fix chuẩn 100% lỗi vendorPrefix của VS Code */
  input[type="number"]::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
  input[type="number"]::-webkit-inner-spin-button {
      -webkit-appearance: none;
      appearance: none;
      margin: 0;
  }
  input[type="number"] {
      -moz-appearance: textfield;
      appearance: textfield;
  }
  .no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
</style>

<script>
/* ─── SETUP BAN ĐẦU: XỬ LÝ BACKGROUND COLOR MÀ KHÔNG BỊ LỖI CSS LINTER ─── */
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  document.querySelectorAll('.color-swatch').forEach(el => {
    el.style.backgroundColor = el.dataset.bg;
  });

  const firstColor = document.querySelector('.color-radio');
  if (firstColor) { 
    firstColor.checked = true; 
    selectColor(firstColor.value); 
  }
});

/* ─── EVENT LISTENERS (THAY THẾ CHO ONCLICK INLINE) ─── */
// Bắt sự kiện chọn Màu
document.querySelectorAll('.color-radio').forEach(radio => {
  radio.addEventListener('change', function() {
    selectColor(this.value);
  });
});

// Bắt sự kiện chọn Size
document.querySelectorAll('.size-radio').forEach(radio => {
  radio.addEventListener('change', function() {
    const vid = this.dataset.vid;
    const stock = parseInt(this.dataset.stock);
    const price = parseFloat(this.dataset.price);
    selectSize(vid, stock, price);
  });
});

// Bắt sự kiện Tăng Giảm
document.querySelectorAll('.btn-qty').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    chQty(parseInt(this.dataset.qty));
  });
});

// Bắt sự kiện Slider Hình ảnh
document.querySelectorAll('.btn-slide').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    slide(parseInt(this.dataset.dir));
  });
});

document.querySelectorAll('.thumbnail-btn').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    goTo(parseInt(this.dataset.index));
  });
});

// Bắt sự kiện Wishlist
const wishlistBtn = document.getElementById('btn-wishlist');
if (wishlistBtn) {
  wishlistBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    if(typeof toggleHeart === 'function') {
      toggleHeart(this.dataset.pid, this);
    }
  });
}

/* ─── XỬ LÝ LOGIC ─── */
function selectColor(color) {
  document.getElementById('color-label').innerText = color;
  
  document.querySelectorAll('.size-group').forEach(g => {
      g.style.display = 'none';
  });
  
  document.querySelectorAll('.size-group').forEach(g => {
      if(g.dataset.color === color) {
          g.style.display = 'grid';
      }
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('.size-radio').forEach(i => i.checked = false);
  
  const btn = document.getElementById('btn-submit');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.innerText = "Chọn kích thước";
  btn.className = "flex-1 h-16 bg-stone-200 text-stone-400 text-[13px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] rounded-2xl cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300";
  
  document.getElementById('selected-variant-id').value = '';
  document.getElementById('stock-status').innerText = "Vui lòng chọn kích thước";
  
  const qty = document.getElementById('qty');
  qty.value = 1;
  qty.max = 1;
}

function selectSize(vid, stock, price) {
  const btn = document.getElementById('btn-submit');
  const status = document.getElementById('stock-status');
  const priceEl = document.getElementById('price-display');
  const vidInput = document.getElementById('selected-variant-id');
  const qtyInput = document.getElementById('qty');

  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.innerText = "Thêm vào túi hàng";
  btn.className = "flex-1 h-16 bg-stone-900 text-white text-[13px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.1em] rounded-2xl hover:bg-stone-800 transition-all shadow-[0_10px_30px_rgba(28,25,23,0.2)] flex items-center justify-center gap-2";
  
  status.innerHTML = `<span class="text-emerald-600">Sẵn sàng giao — Còn ${stock} sản phẩm</span>`;
  priceEl.innerText = new Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN').format(price) + " ₫";
  vidInput.value = vid;
  
  qtyInput.max = stock;
  if(parseInt(qtyInput.value) > stock) qtyInput.value = stock;
}

function chQty(d) {
  const el = document.getElementById('qty');
  const maxStock = parseInt(el.max) || 1; 
  let v = parseInt(el.value) + d;
  
  if (v < 1) v = 1;
  if (v > maxStock) v = maxStock;
  
  el.value = v;
}

/* ─── CAROUSEL HIỆU ỨNG FADE ─── */
const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.carousel-slide');
let current = 0;

function goTo(n) {
  if (slides.length <= 1) return;
  slides[current].style.opacity = '0';
  slides[current].style.zIndex = '0';
  current = (n + slides.length) % slides.length;
  slides[current].style.opacity = '1';
  slides[current].style.zIndex = '10';
  
  document.querySelectorAll('.thumbnail-btn').forEach((b, i) => {
    b.classList.toggle('border-stone-900', i === current);
    b.style.opacity = (i === current) ? '1' : '0.5';
  });
}

function slide(d) { 
  goTo(current + d); 
}
</script>
{% endblock %}
</file>

              <input type="number" name="quantity" id="qv-qty" value="1" min="1" readonly class="w-10 text-center font-semibold text-stone-900 bg-transparent outline-none pointer-events-none tabular-nums">
              <button type="button" onclick="qvChangeQty(1)" class="flex-1 h-full text-lg text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-900 rounded-r-full">+</button>
            </div>
            <button type="submit" name="action" value="add_to_cart" class="flex-1 bg-stone-900 text-white rounded-full h-12 text-sm font-semibold shadow-md hover:bg-stone-700 active:scale-[0.98] transition-all">
              Thêm vào giỏ
            </button>
          </div>
          <a href="#" id="qv-detail-link" class="block w-full text-center py-3 text-xs font-semibold text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-900 underline underline-offset-4 transition-colors mt-1">
            Xem chi tiết sản phẩm
          </a>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
  .line-clamp-1 { display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 1; line-clamp: 1; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; }
  .no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .no-scrollbar { -ms-overflow-style: none; scrollbar-width: none; }
  .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: all 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); }
  .reveal.active { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
</style>

<script>
  // ── LOGIC ANIMATION TRƯỢT KHI CUỘN TRANG ──
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-delay]').forEach(el => {
      el.style.transitionDelay = el.getAttribute('data-delay') + 'ms';
    });
  });

  // ── LOGIC HERO SLIDER TỰ ĐỘNG CHUYỂN ẢNH ──
  let currentSlide = 0;
  const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-slide');
  const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.slide-dot');
  let slideInterval;

  function showSlide(index) {
    slides[currentSlide].classList.remove('opacity-100', 'z-10');
    slides[currentSlide].classList.add('opacity-0', 'z-0');
    slides[currentSlide].querySelector('.slide-img').classList.remove('scale-105');
    dots[currentSlide].classList.remove('bg-white');
    dots[currentSlide].classList.add('bg-white/40');

    currentSlide = index;

    slides[currentSlide].classList.remove('opacity-0', 'z-0');
    slides[currentSlide].classList.add('opacity-100', 'z-10');
    slides[currentSlide].querySelector('.slide-img').classList.add('scale-105');
    dots[currentSlide].classList.remove('bg-white/40');
    dots[currentSlide].classList.add('bg-white');
  }

  function nextSlide() {
    let nextIndex = (currentSlide + 1) % slides.length;
    showSlide(nextIndex);
  }

  function goToSlide(index) {
    clearInterval(slideInterval);
    showSlide(index);
    slideInterval = setInterval(nextSlide, 5000); // Reset timer
  }

  // Chạy slider mỗi 5 giây
  if (slides.length > 1) {
    slideInterval = setInterval(nextSlide, 5000);
  }

  // ── LOGIC MODAL XEM NHANH ──
  let qvMaxStock = 1;

  function triggerQuickView(btn) {
    const id = btn.getAttribute('data-id');
    const name = btn.getAttribute('data-name');
    const price = btn.getAttribute('data-price');
    const image = btn.getAttribute('data-image');
    const category = btn.getAttribute('data-category');
    const stock = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-stock')) || 0;
    openQuickView(id, name, price, image, category, stock);
  }

  function openQuickView(id, name, price, image, category, stock) {
    const modal = document.getElementById('quick-view-modal');
    const content = modal.querySelector('.relative');
    
    document.getElementById('qv-input-id').value = id;
    document.getElementById('qv-name').innerText = name;
    document.getElementById('qv-price').innerHTML = `${Number(price).toLocaleString('en-US')} <span class="text-base font-medium text-stone-500">₫</span>`;
    document.getElementById('qv-category').innerText = category;
    
    const imgEl = document.getElementById('qv-image');
    imgEl.src = image || 'https://placehold.co/600x800/f5f5f4/a8a29e?text=No+Image';
    imgEl.classList.remove('opacity-100');
    imgEl.classList.add('opacity-0');
    imgEl.onload = () => { imgEl.classList.remove('opacity-0'); imgEl.classList.add('opacity-100'); };

    document.getElementById('qv-detail-link').href = `/product/${id}`;
    
    const stockEl = document.getElementById('qv-stock-status');
    if (stock > 0) {
        qvMaxStock = stock;
        stockEl.innerHTML = `<span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500"></span> <span class="text-emerald-600">Còn hàng</span>`;
        stockEl.className = "text-xs font-semibold bg-emerald-50 px-2 py-1 rounded-md flex items-center gap-1.5";
    } else {
        qvMaxStock = 1;
        stockEl.innerHTML = `<span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-red-500"></span> <span class="text-red-600">Hết hàng</span>`;
        stockEl.className = "text-xs font-semibold bg-red-50 px-2 py-1 rounded-md flex items-center gap-1.5";
    }
    document.getElementById('qv-qty').value = 1;
    
    modal.classList.remove('hidden');
    modal.classList.add('flex');
    setTimeout(() => {
      modal.classList.remove('opacity-0');
      content.classList.remove('scale-95');
      content.classList.add('scale-100');
    }, 10);
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }

  function closeQuickView() {
    const modal = document.getElementById('quick-view-modal');
    const content = modal.querySelector('.relative');
    modal.classList.add('opacity-0');
    content.classList.remove('scale-100');
    content.classList.add('scale-95');
    setTimeout(() => {
      modal.classList.add('hidden');
      modal.classList.remove('flex');
      document.body.style.overflow = ''; 
    }, 300);
  }

  function qvChangeQty(delta) {
    const el = document.getElementById('qv-qty');
    let val = parseInt(el.value) + delta;
    if (val >= 1 && val <= qvMaxStock) el.value = val;
  }
</script>

{% endblock %}
</file>

      {# RECENT ORDERS #}
      <div class="lg:col-span-8 reveal" style="transition-delay: 300ms;">

          <h2 class="text-[11px] font-bold text-stone-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Giao dịch gần đây</h2>
          <a href="/profile/orders" class="text-xs font-semibold text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-900 transition-colors flex items-center gap-1 group">
            Xem toàn bộ <svg class="w-3 h-3 group-hover:translate-x-0.5 transition-transform" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5"/></svg>
          </a>
        </div>
        
        {% if orders %}
        <div class="flex flex-col gap-4">
          {% for order in orders %}
          <a href="/profile/orders/{{ order.id }}" class="group block bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgb(0,0,0,0.03)] border border-stone-100 p-5 md:p-6 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.06)] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all">
            
            <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-5">
              
              <div class="flex flex-col gap-2.5">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <span class="font-mono text-sm font-bold text-stone-900 uppercase">#{{ order.id[:8].upper() }}</span>
                  
                  <span class="text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full
                    {% if order.status=='pending' %}bg-amber-100 text-amber-700
                    {% elif order.status=='delivered' %}bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700
                    {% elif order.status=='cancelled' %}bg-red-100 text-red-600
                    {% else %}bg-stone-100 text-stone-600{% endif %}">
                    {% if order.status == 'pending' %}Chờ xử lý
                    {% elif order.status == 'delivered' %}Đã giao
                    {% elif order.status == 'cancelled' %}Đã hủy
                    {% else %}{{ order.status }}{% endif %}
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div class="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-stone-400">
                  <svg class="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z"/></svg>
                  {{ order.created_at[:16].replace('T', ' ') if order.created_at else 'Hệ thống lưu vết' }}
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="flex items-center justify-between sm:justify-end gap-6 pt-4 border-t border-stone-50 sm:pt-0 sm:border-0">
                <div class="text-left sm:text-right">
                  <p class="text-[10px] font-semibold text-stone-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-0.5">Tổng thanh toán</p>
                  <p class="text-lg font-bold text-stone-900 tracking-tight">{{ '{:,.0f}'.format(order.total_amount) }} <span class="text-xs text-stone-500 font-medium">₫</span></p>
                </div>
                <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-stone-50 flex items-center justify-center text-stone-400 group-hover:bg-stone-900 group-hover:text-white transition-colors">
                  <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5"/></svg>
                </div>
              </div>

            </div>
          </a>
          {% endfor %}
        </div>
        
        {% else %}
        <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-200 border-dashed p-12 md:p-16 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center">
          <div class="w-16 h-16 bg-stone-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-stone-300 mb-5">
            <svg class="w-8 h-8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m20.25 7.5-.625 10.632a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.247 2.118H6.622a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.247-2.118L3.75 7.5m8.25 3v6.75m0 0-3-3m3 3 3-3M3.375 7.5h17.25c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125v-1.5c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H3.375c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125Z"/></svg>
          </div>
          <p class="text-sm font-semibold text-stone-800 mb-1">Chưa có giao dịch nào</p>
          <p class="text-xs text-stone-500 mb-6">Bắt đầu khám phá các bộ sưu tập mới nhất.</p>
          <a href="/shop" class="bg-stone-900 text-white px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-stone-700 transition-colors shadow-md">
            Mua sắm ngay
          </a>
        </div>
        {% endif %}
      </div>

    </div>

<file path="app/__init__.py">
"""
app/__init__.py  –  Application Factory (GUA MAISON 2026 Edition)
"""
import logging
from flask import Flask, session, render_template_string
from flask_wtf.csrf import CSRFProtect, CSRFError

from config.settings import get_config, validate_config

logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

csrf = CSRFProtect()

from app.models.cart_model     import CartModel
from app.models.category_model import CategoryModel


def create_app() -> Flask:
    app = Flask(__name__, template_folder="templates", static_folder="static")

    # 1. Validate & Load Config
    validate_config()
    app.config.from_object(get_config())

    # 2. Extensions
    csrf.init_app(app)

    # 3. Blueprints
    from app.controllers.auth_controller                               import auth_bp
    from app.controllers.product_controller                            import products_bp
    from app.controllers.cart_controller                               import cart_bp
    from app.controllers.admin                                         import admin_bp
    from app.controllers.profile_controller                            import profile_bp
    from app.controllers.chat_controller                               import chat_bp
    from app.controllers.ai_controller                                 import ai_bp
    from app.controllers.favorite_controller                           import favorite_bp
    from app.controllers.payment_controller                            import payment_bp
    from app.controllers.admin.admin_shipping_controller               import admin_shipping_bp
    from app.controllers.admin.admin_shipping_providers_controller     import admin_providers_bp

    for bp in [
        auth_bp, products_bp, cart_bp, admin_bp,
        profile_bp, chat_bp, ai_bp, favorite_bp, payment_bp,
        admin_shipping_bp, admin_providers_bp,
    ]:
        app.register_blueprint(bp)

    if app.config.get("DEBUG"):
        from app.controllers.debug_controller import debug_bp
        app.register_blueprint(debug_bp)
        logger.info("🛠️  Debug blueprint đã được kích hoạt (Development only).")

    # 4. Context Processor
    @app.context_processor
    def inject_globals() -> dict:
        cart_count = 0
        categories = []
        pending_returns = 0
        user_id = session.get("user_id")
        role = session.get("role")

        if user_id:
            try:
                cart_count = CartModel.get_count(user_id)
            except Exception:
                logger.exception("context_processor: Lỗi khi lấy cart_count.")

        try:
            categories = CategoryModel.get_all()
        except Exception:
            logger.exception("context_processor: Lỗi khi lấy categories.")

        if role == "admin":
            try:
                from app.utils.supabase_client import get_supabase
                r = (
                    get_supabase()
                    .table("return_requests")
                    .select("id", count="exact")
                    .eq("status", "pending")
                    .execute()
                )
                pending_returns = r.count or 0
            except Exception:
                logger.warning("context_processor: Không lấy được pending_returns.")

        return {
            "current_user": {
                "id": user_id,
                "email": session.get("email"),
                "full_name": session.get("full_name"),
                "role": role,
            },
            "cart_count": cart_count,
            "global_categories": categories,
            "pending_returns": pending_returns,
        }

    # 5. Error Handlers
    def _error_response(code: int, title: str, desc: str):
        show_debug = app.config.get("DEBUG", False)
        return render_template_string(
            ERROR_TEMPLATE, code=code, title=title, desc=desc,
            show_debug=show_debug
        ), code

    @app.errorhandler(400)
    def bad_request(_e):
        return _error_response(400, "Yêu cầu không hợp lệ",
                               "Dữ liệu gửi lên bị lỗi hoặc không đúng định dạng.")

    @app.errorhandler(403)
    def forbidden(_e):
        return _error_response(403, "Từ chối truy cập",
                               "Bạn không có quyền truy cập vào trang này.")

    @app.errorhandler(CSRFError)
    def handle_csrf_error(_e):
        return _error_response(403, "Phiên bảo mật hết hạn",
                               "Token bảo mật đã hết hạn. Vui lòng tải lại trang và thử lại.")

    @app.errorhandler(404)
    def not_found(_e):
        return _error_response(404, "Không tìm thấy trang",
                               "Đường dẫn này không tồn tại hoặc đã bị gỡ khỏi hệ thống GUA Maison.")

    @app.errorhandler(405)
    def method_not_allowed(_e):
        return _error_response(405, "Phương thức không được phép",
                               "Hành động này không được hỗ trợ trên endpoint hiện tại.")

    @app.errorhandler(413)
    def request_too_large(_e):
        return _error_response(413, "File quá lớn",
                               "Kích thước file vượt quá giới hạn 10 MB. Vui lòng chọn ảnh nhỏ hơn.")

    @app.errorhandler(500)
    def server_error(_e):
        logger.exception("Internal Server Error")
        return _error_response(500, "Lỗi máy chủ",
                               "Hệ thống đang gặp sự cố kỹ thuật. Đội ngũ kỹ sư đang xử lý.")

    return app


# ── Error Page Template ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

<!-- Dữ liệu cho Chart.js -->
<script id="monthly-data" type="application/json">
{{ stats.monthly | tojson | safe }}
</script>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    let monthlyData = [];
    const dataElement = document.getElementById('monthly-data');
    
    if (dataElement) {
        try {
            monthlyData = JSON.parse(dataElement.textContent);
        } catch(e) {
            console.error("Failed to parse monthly data");
        }
    }

    if (monthlyData.length > 0) {
        new Chart(document.getElementById('monthlyRevenueChart'), {
            type: 'bar',
            data: {
                labels: monthlyData.map(d => d.month),
                datasets: [{
                    label: 'Doanh thu',
                    data: monthlyData.map(d => d.revenue),
                    backgroundColor: '#1f2937',
                    borderRadius: 6,
                    barThickness: 32
                }]
            },
            options: {
                responsive: true,
                maintainAspectRatio: false,
                plugins: {
                    legend: { display: false },
                    tooltip: {
                        callbacks: {
                            label: ctx => ctx.raw.toLocaleString('vi-VN') + ' ₫'
                        }
                    }
                },
                scales: {
                    y: {
                        beginAtZero: true,
                        ticks: { callback: v => (v / 1000000) + 'tr' }
                    },
                    x: { grid: { display: false } }
                }
            }
        });
    }
});
</script>

  <script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
      
      // 1. Logic Menu Mobile
      const openBtn  = document.getElementById('openMenu');
      const closeBtn = document.getElementById('closeMenu');
      const menu     = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');

      if (openBtn && closeBtn && menu) {
        const toggleMenu = (show) => {
          if (show) {
            menu.classList.remove('invisible', 'opacity-0');
            menu.classList.add('opacity-100');
            openBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
            document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
          } else {
            menu.classList.add('opacity-0');
            openBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
            setTimeout(() => menu.classList.add('invisible'), 400);
            document.body.style.overflow = '';
          }
        };
        openBtn.addEventListener('click', () => toggleMenu(true));
        closeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => toggleMenu(false));
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
          if (e.key === 'Escape' && !menu.classList.contains('invisible')) toggleMenu(false);
        });
      }

      // 2. Scroll Reveal
      const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            entry.target.classList.add('active');
            observer.unobserve(entry.target);
          }
        });
      }, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px' });
      document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
    });

    // 3. Toast Notification
    let toastContainer = null;
    function showToast(message, isRemoved = false) {
      if (!toastContainer) {
        toastContainer = document.createElement('div');
        toastContainer.className = 'fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-[9999] flex flex-col gap-3 pointer-events-none';
        document.body.appendChild(toastContainer);
      }
      const toast = document.createElement('div');
      toast.className = 'bg-stone-900 text-white px-5 py-3.5 rounded-xl shadow-2xl flex items-center gap-3 text-sm font-bold tracking-wide transform translate-y-10 opacity-0 transition-all duration-400 ease-out pointer-events-auto min-w-[280px] max-w-[400px] border border-stone-700/50';
      const icon = isRemoved 
        ? `<svg class="w-5 h-5 text-stone-400 shrink-0" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M14.74 9l-.346 9m-4.788 0L9.26 9m9.968-3.21c.342.052.682.107 1.022.166m-1.022-.165L18.16 19.673a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244 2.077H8.084a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244-2.077L4.772 5.79m14.456 0a48.108 48.108 0 00-3.478-.397m-12 .562c.34-.059.68-.114 1.022-.165m0 0a48.11 48.11 0 013.478-.397m7.5 0v-.916c0-1.18-.91-2.164-2.09-2.201a51.964 51.964 0 00-3.32 0c-1.18.037-2.09 1.022-2.09 2.201v.916m7.5 0a48.667 48.667 0 00-7.5 0"/></svg>`
        : `<svg class="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-400 shrink-0" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5"/></svg>`;
      toast.innerHTML = `${icon} <span class="truncate">${message}</span>`;
      toastContainer.appendChild(toast);
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        toast.classList.remove('translate-y-10', 'opacity-0');
      });
      setTimeout(() => {
        toast.classList.add('opacity-0', 'translate-x-10');
        setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 400);
      }, 3000);
    }

    // 4. Wishlist
    async function toggleHeart(productId, btnElement) {
      if (window.event) window.event.preventDefault();
      const csrfToken = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.getAttribute('content') || '';
      const icon = btnElement.querySelector('.heart-icon');
      if(icon) icon.classList.add('scale-75');
      try {
          const response = await fetch('/api/favorites/toggle', {
              method: 'POST',
              headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-CSRFToken': csrfToken },
              body: JSON.stringify({ product_id: productId })
          });
          const result = await response.json();
          if (response.status === 401) {
              showToast("Vui lòng đăng nhập để sử dụng tính năng này", true);
              setTimeout(() => window.location.href = '/auth/login', 1500);
              return;
          }
          if (result.status === 'success') {
              if (result.action === 'added') {
                  if(icon) { icon.classList.remove('text-stone-300'); icon.classList.add('text-red-500'); }
                  showToast("Đã lưu vào bộ sưu tập cá nhân");
              } else {
                  if(icon) { icon.classList.remove('text-red-500'); icon.classList.add('text-stone-300'); }
                  showToast("Đã xóa khỏi bộ sưu tập", true);
              }
          } else {
              showToast(result.message || "Có lỗi xảy ra", true);
          }
      } catch (error) {
          console.error("Lỗi API Yêu Thích:", error);
          showToast("Không thể kết nối đến máy chủ", true);
      } finally {
          if(icon) setTimeout(() => icon.classList.remove('scale-75'), 150);
      }
    }
  </script>

  {% block extra_scripts %}{% endblock %}
</body>
</html>
</file>

{# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   POPUP MODAL XEM NHANH (CẬP NHẬT CHUẨN UX)
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ #}
<div id="quick-view-modal" class="fixed inset-0 z-[200] hidden items-center justify-center opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-300 px-4 sm:px-6 font-sans">
